```aspnetcorerazor
            async function sendMessage() {
                const msg = chatInput.value.trim();
                if (!msg) return;

                chatMessages.innerHTML += `<div><strong>You:</strong> ${msg}</div>`;
                chatInput.value = '';
                sendBtn.disabled = true;

                try {
                    const res = await fetch('/api/chat/ask', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ message: msg })
                    });
                    
                    if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to get response');
                    
                    const data = await res.json();
                    chatMessages.innerHTML += `<div class="mt-2 text-primary"><strong>AI:</strong> ${data.reply}</div>`;
                } catch (error) {
                    chatMessages.innerHTML += `<div class="mt-2 text-danger"><strong>AI:</strong> Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.</div>`;
                } finally {
                    sendBtn.disabled = false;
                    chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
                }
            }

->

            async function sendMessage() {
                const msg = chatInput.value.trim();
                if (!msg) return;

                chatMessages.innerHTML += `<div><strong>You:</strong> ${msg}</div>`;
                chatInput.value = '';
                sendBtn.disabled = true;
                sendBtn.textContent = 'Sending...';

                try {
                    const res = await fetch('/api/chat/ask', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ message: msg })
                    });
                    
                    if (!res.ok) {
                        const errorText = await res.text();
                        throw new Error(`Server error: ${res.status} - ${errorText}`);
                    }
                    
                    const data = await res.json();
                    chatMessages.innerHTML += `<div class="mt-2 text-primary"><strong>AI:</strong> ${data.reply}</div>`;
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Chat error:', error);
                    chatMessages.innerHTML += `<div class="mt-2 text-danger"><strong>AI:</strong> Error: ${error.message}. Please check console for details.</div>`;
                } finally {
                    sendBtn.disabled = false;
                    sendBtn.textContent = 'Send';
                    chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
                }
            }
```

```csharp
                var reply = await _ai.GetReplyAsync(req.Message);
                return Ok(new { reply });
```

**User**

why some responses are cress out


---

**Cursor**

The `[OUT]` tag in the AI replies looks like it’s leaking from the model output; responses also end abruptly with “…” which points to truncation.

Checking the system prompt and response handling in the AI service:


Two issues causing the odd output:
1. The `[OUT]` tag likely comes from the model treating these as system/instruction tokens (possibly due to OpenRouter format expectations).
2. Truncated replies indicate `max_tokens` may be too low or responses hit the limit.

Update `Services/AIAssistantService.cs`:

```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Text;

namespace AutoEdge.Services
{
    public class AIAssistantService : IAIAssistantService
    {
        private readonly HttpClient _http;
        private readonly AISettings _settings;

        public AIAssistantService(HttpClient http, IOptions<AISettings> settings)
        {
            _http = http;
            _settings = settings.Value;
            _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("Authorization", $"Bearer {_settings.ApiKey}");
            _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("HTTP-Referer", "https://autoedge.com");
            _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Title", "AutoEdge Chat");
        }

        public async Task<string> GetReplyAsync(string userMessage)
        {
            try
            {
                var systemMessage = @"You are the AutoEdge AI Assistant. AutoEdge is a South African car dealership that sells new and pre-owned vehicles.
We offer:
- Car sales, financing, and trade-ins
- Vehicle servicing and maintenance
- Bookings for test drives and service appointments
- A recruitment program for mechanics, sales reps, and customer service roles
- Online assessments and interviews for applicants

Provide helpful, concise responses. Do not include any tags or tokens like [OUT], [IN], etc. in your responses.";

                var request = new
                {
                    model = _settings.Model,
                    messages = new[]
                    {
                        new { role = "system", content = systemMessage },
                        new { role = "user", content = userMessage }
                    },
                    temperature = _settings.Temperature,
                    max_tokens = _settings.MaxTokens
                };

                var response = await _http.PostAsJsonAsync(_settings.BaseUrl, request);
                var responseText = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                
                if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
                {
                    throw new Exception($"AI API Error: {response.StatusCode} - {responseText}");
                }

                var json = JsonDocument.Parse(responseText).RootElement;
                var content = json.GetProperty("choices")[0]
                           .GetProperty("message")
                           .GetProperty("content")
                           .GetString() ?? "I'm sorry, I couldn't process that request.";

                // Clean up any tags or unwanted tokens
                content = content.Replace("[OUT]", "").Replace("[IN]", "").Trim();
                
                return content;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                return "I apologize, but I encountered an error. Please try again or contact our support team.";
            }
        }
    }
}
```

Changes:
1. Add OpenRouter headers: `HTTP-Referer`, `X-Title`.
2. Tell the model not to emit tags like `[OUT]`/`[IN]`.
3. Strip any remaining tags from the response.
4. Handling may also need the Stop array; adjust if truncation persists.

Also update `appsettings.json` to raise max tokens if replies are cut off.

Current configuration:
```json
"AI": {
  "BaseUrl": "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions",
  "ApiKey": "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",
  "Model": "mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct:free",
  "Temperature": 0.4,
  "MaxTokens": 1200
}
```

Change `MaxTokens` to a higher value to prevent truncation.

If issues persist, test with a cleaner model:
- `meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct:free`
- `google/gemini-flash-1.5-8b:free`

```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Text;

namespace AutoEdge.Services
{
    public class AIAssistantService : IAIAssistantService
    {
        private readonly HttpClient _http;
        private readonly AISettings _settings;

        public AIAssistantService(HttpClient http, IOptions<AISettings> settings)
        {
            _http = http;
            _settings = settings.Value;
            _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("Authorization", $"Bearer {_settings.ApiKey}");
            _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("HTTP-Referer", "https://autoedge.com");
            _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Title", "AutoEdge Chat");
        }

        public async Task<string> GetReplyAsync(string userMessage)
        {
            try
            {
                var systemMessage = @"You are the AutoEdge AI Assistant. AutoEdge is a South African car dealership that sells new and pre-owned vehicles.
We offer:
- Car sales, financing, and trade-ins
- Vehicle servicing and maintenance
- Bookings for test drives and service appointments
- A recruitment program for mechanics, sales reps, and customer service roles
- Online assessments and interviews for applicants

Provide helpful, concise responses. Do not include any tags or tokens like [OUT], [IN], etc. in your responses.";

                var request = new
                {
                    model = _settings.Model,
                    messages = new[]
                    {
                        new { role = "system", content = systemMessage },
                        new { role = "user", content = userMessage }
                    },
                    temperature = _settings.Temperature,
                    max_tokens = _settings.MaxTokens
                };

                var response = await _http.PostAsJsonAsync(_settings.BaseUrl, request);
                var responseText = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                
                if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
                {
                    throw new Exception($"AI API Error: {response.StatusCode} - {responseText}");
                }

                var json = JsonDocument.Parse(responseText).RootElement;
                var content = json.GetProperty("choices")[0]
                           .GetProperty("message")
                           .GetProperty("content")
                           .GetString() ?? "I'm sorry, I couldn't process that request.";

                // Clean up any tags or unwanted tokens
                content = content.Replace("[OUT]", "").Replace("[IN]", "").Trim();
                
                return content;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                return "I apologize, but I encountered an error. Please try again or contact our support team.";
            }
        }
    }
}
```

**Cursor**

The AI replies are blank (empty lines), which suggests the AI service is failing to fetch responses. Checking the current service implementation.


Checking `appsettings.json` for API configuration:


The issue: the API key is defaulting to an empty string.

- The configured key starts with `sk-or-v1-...`, so it’s present, but the service may not be reading it.
- Configuration might not be bound when `AIAssistantService` initializes.

Fix:
1) Ensure `AIAssistantService` is registered with `IOptions<AISettings>`.
2) Bind configuration in `Program.cs` if missing.
3) Add a fallback and logging to diagnose:
```csharp
public AIAssistantService(HttpClient http, IOptions<AISettings> settings, ILogger<AIAssistantService> logger)
{
    _http = http;
    _settings = settings.Value;
    logger.LogInformation($"API Key configured: {!string.IsNullOrEmpty(_settings.ApiKey)}");
    _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("Authorization", $"Bearer {_settings.ApiKey}");
    _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("HTTP-Referer", "https://autoedge.com");
    _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Title", "AutoEdge Chat");
}
```
4) Verify the model endpoint is correct and the service reads `appsettings.json`.

Next steps:
- Confirm config binding and service registration.
- Add the logging change and test.
- Check for errors in browser console (F12) and application logs.


```csharp
public AIAssistantService(HttpClient http, IOptions<AISettings> settings, ILogger<AIAssistantService> logger)
{
    _http = http;
    _settings = settings.Value;
    logger.LogInformation($"API Key configured: {!string.IsNullOrEmpty(_settings.ApiKey)}");
    _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("Authorization", $"Bearer {_settings.ApiKey}");
    _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("HTTP-Referer", "https://autoedge.com");
    _http.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Title", "AutoEdge Chat");
}
```

`AI Assistant Service` is registered with `AddHttpClient`, but config binding for `AISettings` may not be working.

Likely cause: the empty response suggests an API format mismatch for OpenRouter.

Proposed changes to `Services/AIAssistantService.cs`:

```csharp
public async Task<string> GetReplyAsync(string userMessage)
{
    try
    {
        // Debug: Log the actual request
        Console.WriteLine($"Sending request to: {_settings.BaseUrl}");
        Console.WriteLine($"Using model: {_settings.Model}");
        
        var systemMessage = @"You are the AutoEdge AI Assistant... (your existing message)";

        var request = new
        {
            model = _settings.Model,
            messages = new[]
            {
                new { role = "system", content = systemMessage },
                new { role = "user", content = userMessage }
            },
            temperature = _settings.Temperature,
            max_tokens = _settings.MaxTokens
        };

        var response = await _http.PostAsJsonAsync(_settings.BaseUrl, request);
        var responseText = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
        
        // Debug: Log the response
        Console.WriteLine($"Response status: {response.StatusCode}");
        Console.WriteLine($"Response body: {responseText}");
        
        if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
        {
            throw new Exception($"AI API Error: {response.StatusCode} - {responseText}");
        }

        var json = JsonDocument.Parse(responseText).RootElement;
        
        // Check if response has the expected structure
        if (!json.TryGetProperty("choices", out var choices))
        {
            throw new Exception($"Unexpected response format: {responseText}");
        }
        
        var content = choices[0]
                   .GetProperty("message")
                   .GetProperty("content")
                   .GetString();
        
        // If content is null or empty, return a default message
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(content))
        {
            return "I apologize, but I couldn't generate a response. Please try rephrasing your question.";
        }

        // Clean up any tags or unwanted tokens
        content = content.Replace("[OUT]", "").Replace("[IN]", "").Trim();
        
        return content;
    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        // Return the actual error message for debugging
        return $"Error: {ex.Message}. Please check the console for details.";
    }
}
```

Quick checks:
- Open the browser console (F12) and look for JavaScript errors.
- Check server logs for exceptions and response payloads.

which api model can i use for more responses

---

**Cursor**

You're using `mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct:free` on OpenRouter. It can return empty or short replies due to token limits and output format.

Better free options on OpenRouter:
1) meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct:free — consistent and responsive
```json
"Model": "meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct:free"
```
2) google/gemini-flash-1.5-8b:free — reliable
```json
"Model": "google/gemini-flash-1.5-8b:free"
```

Update `appsettings.json`:


```json
"Model": "meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct:free"
```

```json
"Model": "google/gemini-flash-1.5-8b:free"
```

Use this updated configuration:

```json
"AI": {
  "BaseUrl": "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions",
  "ApiKey": "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",
  "Model": "meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct:free",
  "Temperature": 0.6,
  "MaxTokens": 1000
}
```

Improvements:
- Model: `mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct:free` → `meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct:free`
- Temperature: 0.4 → 0.6 for more varied replies
- MaxTokens: 1200 → 1000 to avoid truncation

Alternative if Llama is slow:
```json
"Model": "google/gemini-flash-1.5-8b:free"
```

After updating, restart the app and test the chat.

- Model: Changed from `mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct:free` to `meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct:free`

- MaxTokens: 1200 → 1000

Updating all RecruitmentRecruiter views to match the RecruitmentAdmin styling. Starting with `Dashboard.cshtml`.


```aspnetcorerazor
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Recruiter Dashboard";
    var upcomingInterviews = ViewBag.UpcomingInterviews as List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview>;
    var completedInterviews = ViewBag.CompletedInterviews as List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview>;
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h3 class="card-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-tie mr-2"></i>
                        Recruiter Dashboard
                    </h3>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <style>
                        .dashboard-card-primary {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-success {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-info {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-secondary {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary .inner,
                        .dashboard-card-success .inner,
                        .dashboard-card-info .inner,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary .inner {
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-success .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-info .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary .icon {
                            color: white;
                            opacity: 0.8;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary a,
                        .dashboard-card-success a,
                        .dashboard-card-info a,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary a {
                            color: white;
                        }
                    </style>

                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-info">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Upcoming Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-video"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-success">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(completedInterviews?.Count ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Completed Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-primary">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count(i => i.ScheduledDateTime.Date == DateTime.Today) ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Today's Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-calendar-day"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-secondary">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count(i => i.ScheduledDateTime <= DateTime.Now.AddHours(2) && i.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now) ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Starting Soon</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    @if (upcomingInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-header">
                                        <h3 class="card-title">
                                            <i class="fas fa-video mr-2"></i>
                                            Upcoming Interviews (Next 7 Days)
                                        </h3>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div class="table-responsive">
                                            <table class="table table-bordered table-striped">
                                                <thead>
                                                    <tr>
                                                        <th>Candidate</th>
                                                        <th>Position</th>
                                                        <th>Date & Time</th>
                                                        <th>Duration</th>
                                                        <th>Status</th>
                                                        <th>Actions</th>
                                                    </tr>
                                                </thead>
                                                <tbody>
                                                    @foreach (var interview in upcomingInterviews.Take(10))
                                                    {
                                                        <tr>
                                                            <td>@interview.Application?.FirstName @interview.Application?.LastName</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.JobPosting?.JobTitle</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")<br>
                                                                <small class="text-muted">@interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>@interview.DurationMinutes minutes</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @if (interview.ScheduledDateTime <= DateTime.Now.AddHours(2) && interview.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now)
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge badge-warning">Starting Soon</span>
                                                                }
                                                                else if (interview.ScheduledDateTime.Date == DateTime.Today)
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge badge-info">Today</span>
                                                                }
                                                                else
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge badge-secondary">Scheduled</span>
                                                                }
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("InterviewDetails", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                                                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> View
                                                                    </a>
                                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("JoinInterview", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success">
                                                                        <i class="fas fa-video"></i> Join
                                                                    </a>
                                                                </div>
                                                            </td>
                                                        </tr>
                                                    }
                                                </tbody>
                                            </table>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (completedInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-header">
                                        <h3 class="card-title">
                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle mr-2"></i>
                                            Recent Completed Interviews
                                        </h3>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div class="table-responsive">
                                            <table class="table table-bordered table-striped">
                                                <thead>
                                                    <tr>
                                                        <th>Candidate</th>
                                                        <th>Position</th>
                                                        <th>Completed Date</th>
                                                        <th>Rating</th>
                                                        <th>Actions</th>
                                                    </tr>
                                                </thead>
                                                <tbody>
                                                    @foreach (var interview in completedInterviews.Take(5))
                                                    {
                                                        <tr>
                                                            <td>@interview.Application?.FirstName @interview.Application?.LastName</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.JobPosting?.JobTitle</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.CompletedDate?.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @if (interview.InterviewRating > 0)
                                                                {
                                                                    <div class="rating">
                                                                        @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                                        {
                                                                            <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= interview.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                                        }
                                                                        <span class="ml-2">(@interview.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                                    </div>
                                                                }
                                                                else
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="text-muted">Not rated</span>
                                                                }
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                <a href="@Url.Action("InterviewDetails", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                                                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> View Details
                                                                </a>
                                                            </td>
                                                        </tr>
                                                    }
                                                </tbody>
                                            </table>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (!upcomingInterviews?.Any() == true && !completedInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-body text-center py-5">
                                        <i class="fas fa-video fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                                        <h4 class="text-muted">No Interviews Scheduled</h4>
                                        <p class="text-muted">You don't have any interviews scheduled at the moment.</p>
                                        <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="btn btn-primary">
                                            <i class="fas fa-calendar-plus mr-2"></i>View All Interviews
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

```

Styling the dashboard table headers to match the RecruitmentAdmin style:


```aspnetcorerazor
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Recruiter Dashboard";
    var upcomingInterviews = ViewBag.UpcomingInterviews as List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview>;
    var completedInterviews = ViewBag.CompletedInterviews as List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview>;
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h3 class="card-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-tie mr-2"></i>
                        Recruiter Dashboard
                    </h3>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <style>
                        .dashboard-card-primary {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-success {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);
                            color: white;

                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-success .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-info .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary .icon {
                            color: white;
                            opacity: 0.8;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary a,
                        .dashboard-card-success a,
                        .dashboard-card-info a,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary a {
                            color: white;
                        }

                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-info">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Upcoming Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-video"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-success">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(completedInterviews?.Count ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Completed Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-primary">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count(i => i.ScheduledDateTime.Date == DateTime.Today) ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Today's Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-calendar-day"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-secondary">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count(i => i.ScheduledDateTime <= DateTime.Now.AddHours(2) && i.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now) ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Starting Soon</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    @if (upcomingInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-header">
                                        <h3 class="card-title">
                                            <i class="fas fa-video mr-2"></i>
                                            Upcoming Interviews (Next 7 Days)
                                        </h3>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div class="table-responsive">
                                            <style>
                                                .modern-table {
                                                    border-radius: 8px;
                                                    overflow: hidden;
                                                }
                                                .modern-table thead {
                                                    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
                                                }
                                                .modern-table thead th {
                                                    color: white;
                                                    font-weight: 600;
                                                    padding: 12px 16px;
                                                    text-transform: uppercase;
                                                    font-size: 0.85rem;
                                                    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
                                                }
                                                .modern-table tbody td {
                                                    color: #333 !important;
                                                    font-size: 0.95rem;
                                                    vertical-align: middle;
                                                    padding: 12px 16px;
                                                }
                                                .modern-table tbody tr:hover {
                                                    background-color: #f8f9fa;
                                                }
                                            </style>
                                            <table class="table modern-table">
                                                <thead>
                                                    <tr>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-user me-2"></i>Candidate</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-briefcase me-2"></i>Position</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-calendar me-2"></i>Date & Time</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-clock me-2"></i>Duration</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>Status</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-cog me-2"></i>Actions</th>
                                                    </tr>
                                                </thead>
                                                <tbody>
                                                    @foreach (var interview in upcomingInterviews.Take(10))
                                                    {
                                                        <tr>
                                                            <td>@interview.Application?.FirstName @interview.Application?.LastName</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.JobPosting?.JobTitle</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")<br>
                                                                <small class="text-muted">@interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>@interview.DurationMinutes minutes</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @if (interview.ScheduledDateTime <= DateTime.Now.AddHours(2) && interview.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now)
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge badge-warning">Starting Soon</span>
                                                                }
                                                                else if (interview.ScheduledDateTime.Date == DateTime.Today)
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge badge-info">Today</span>
                                                                }
                                                                else
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge badge-secondary">Scheduled</span>
                                                                }
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("InterviewDetails", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                                                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> View
                                                                    </a>
                                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("JoinInterview", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success">
                                                                        <i class="fas fa-video"></i> Join
                                                                    </a>
                                                                </div>
                                                            </td>
                                                        </tr>
                                                    }
                                                </tbody>
                                            </table>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (completedInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-header">
                                        <h3 class="card-title">
                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle mr-2"></i>
                                            Recent Completed Interviews
                                        </h3>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div class="table-responsive">
                                            <table class="table table-bordered table-striped">
                                                <thead>
                                                    <tr>
                                                        <th>Candidate</th>
                                                        <th>Position</th>
                                                        <th>Completed Date</th>
                                                        <th>Rating</th>
                                                        <th>Actions</th>
                                                    </tr>
                                                </thead>
                                                <tbody>
                                                    @foreach (var interview in completedInterviews.Take(5))
                                                    {
                                                        <tr>
                                                            <td>@interview.Application?.FirstName @interview.Application?.LastName</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.JobPosting?.JobTitle</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.CompletedDate?.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @if (interview.InterviewRating > 0)
                                                                {
                                                                    <div class="rating">
                                                                        @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                                        {
                                                                            <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= interview.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                                        }
                                                                        <span class="ml-2">(@interview.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                                    </div>
                                                                }
                                                                else
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="text-muted">Not rated</span>
                                                                }
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                <a href="@Url.Action("InterviewDetails", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                                                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> View Details
                                                                </a>
                                                            </td>
                                                        </tr>
                                                    }
                                                </tbody>
                                            </table>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (!upcomingInterviews?.Any() == true && !completedInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-body text-center py-5">
                                        <i class="fas fa-video fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                                        <h4 class="text-muted">No Interviews Scheduled</h4>
                                        <p class="text-muted">You don't have any interviews scheduled at the moment.</p>
                                        <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="btn btn-primary">
                                            <i class="fas fa-calendar-plus mr-2"></i>View All Interviews
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

Updating status badges to Bootstrap 5 classes:


```aspnetcorerazor
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Recruiter Dashboard";
    var upcomingInterviews = ViewBag.UpcomingInterviews as List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview>;
    var completedInterviews = ViewBag.CompletedInterviews as List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview>;
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h3 class="card-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-tie mr-2"></i>
                        Recruiter Dashboard
                    </h3>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <style>
                        .dashboard-card-primary {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-success {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-info {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-secondary {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary .inner,
                        .dashboard-card-success .inner,
                        .dashboard-card-info .inner,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary .inner {
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-success .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-info .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary .icon {
                            color: white;
                            opacity: 0.8;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary a,
                        .dashboard-card-success a,
                        .dashboard-card-info a,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary a {
                            color: white;
                        }
                    </style>

                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-info">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Upcoming Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-video"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-success">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(completedInterviews?.Count ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Completed Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-primary">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count(i => i.ScheduledDateTime.Date == DateTime.Today) ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Today's Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-calendar-day"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-secondary">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count(i => i.ScheduledDateTime <= DateTime.Now.AddHours(2) && i.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now) ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Starting Soon</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    @if (upcomingInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-header">
                                        <h3 class="card-title">
                                            <i class="fas fa-video mr-2"></i>
                                            Upcoming Interviews (Next 7 Days)
                                        </h3>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div class="table-responsive">
                                            <style>
                                                .modern-table {
                                                    border-radius: 8px;
                                                    overflow: hidden;
                                                }
                                                .modern-table thead {
                                                    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
                                                }
                                                .modern-table thead th {
                                                    color: white;
                                                    font-weight: 600;
                                                    padding: 12px 16px;
                                                    text-transform: uppercase;
                                                    font-size: 0.85rem;
                                                    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
                                                }
                                                .modern-table tbody td {
                                                    color: #333 !important;
                                                    font-size: 0.95rem;
                                                    vertical-align: middle;
                                                    padding: 12px 16px;
                                                }
                                                .modern-table tbody tr:hover {
                                                    background-color: #f8f9fa;
                                                }
                                            </style>
                                            <table class="table modern-table">
                                                <thead>
                                                    <tr>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-user me-2"></i>Candidate</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-briefcase me-2"></i>Position</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-calendar me-2"></i>Date & Time</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-clock me-2"></i>Duration</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>Status</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-cog me-2"></i>Actions</th>
                                                    </tr>
                                                </thead>
                                                <tbody>
                                                    @foreach (var interview in upcomingInterviews.Take(10))
                                                    {
                                                        <tr>
                                                            <td>@interview.Application?.FirstName @interview.Application?.LastName</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.JobPosting?.JobTitle</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")<br>
                                                                <small class="text-muted">@interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>@interview.DurationMinutes minutes</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @if (interview.ScheduledDateTime <= DateTime.Now.AddHours(2) && interview.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now)
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark"><i class="fas fa-clock me-1"></i>Starting Soon</span>
                                                                }
                                                                else if (interview.ScheduledDateTime.Date == DateTime.Today)
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge bg-info text-white"><i class="fas fa-calendar-day me-1"></i>Today</span>
                                                                }
                                                                else
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge bg-secondary text-white"><i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i>Scheduled</span>
                                                                }
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("InterviewDetails", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                                                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> View
                                                                    </a>
                                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("JoinInterview", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success">
                                                                        <i class="fas fa-video"></i> Join
                                                                    </a>
                                                                </div>
                                                            </td>
                                                        </tr>
                                                    }
                                                </tbody>
                                            </table>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (completedInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-header">
                                        <h3 class="card-title">
                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle mr-2"></i>
                                            Recent Completed Interviews
                                        </h3>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div class="table-responsive">
                                            <table class="table table-bordered table-striped">
                                                <thead>
                                                    <tr>
                                                        <th>Candidate</th>
                                                        <th>Position</th>
                                                        <th>Completed Date</th>
                                                        <th>Rating</th>
                                                        <th>Actions</th>
                                                    </tr>
                                                </thead>
                                                <tbody>
                                                    @foreach (var interview in completedInterviews.Take(5))
                                                    {
                                                        <tr>
                                                            <td>@interview.Application?.FirstName @interview.Application?.LastName</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.JobPosting?.JobTitle</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.CompletedDate?.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @if (interview.InterviewRating > 0)
                                                                {
                                                                    <div class="rating">
                                                                        @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                                        {
                                                                            <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= interview.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                                        }
                                                                        <span class="ml-2">(@interview.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                                    </div>
                                                                }
                                                                else
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="text-muted">Not rated</span>
                                                                }
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                <a href="@Url.Action("InterviewDetails", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                                                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> View Details
                                                                </a>
                                                            </td>
                                                        </tr>
                                                    }
                                                </tbody>
                                            </table>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (!upcomingInterviews?.Any() == true && !completedInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-body text-center py-5">
                                        <i class="fas fa-video fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                                        <h4 class="text-muted">No Interviews Scheduled</h4>
                                        <p class="text-muted">You don't have any interviews scheduled at the moment.</p>
                                        <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="btn btn-primary">
                                            <i class="fas fa-calendar-plus mr-2"></i>View All Interviews
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

```

Styling the completed interviews table:


```aspnetcorerazor
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Recruiter Dashboard";
    var upcomingInterviews = ViewBag.UpcomingInterviews as List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview>;
    var completedInterviews = ViewBag.CompletedInterviews as List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview>;
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h3 class="card-title">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-tie mr-2"></i>
                        Recruiter Dashboard
                    </h3>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <style>
                        .dashboard-card-primary {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-success {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-info {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-secondary {
                            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary .inner,
                        .dashboard-card-success .inner,
                        .dashboard-card-info .inner,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary .inner {
                            color: white;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-success .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-info .icon,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary .icon {
                            color: white;
                            opacity: 0.8;
                        }
                        .dashboard-card-primary a,
                        .dashboard-card-success a,
                        .dashboard-card-info a,
                        .dashboard-card-secondary a {
                            color: white;
                        }
                    </style>

                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-info">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Upcoming Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-video"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-success">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(completedInterviews?.Count ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Completed Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-primary">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count(i => i.ScheduledDateTime.Date == DateTime.Today) ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Today's Interviews</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-calendar-day"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
                            <div class="small-box dashboard-card-secondary">
                                <div class="inner">
                                    <h3>@(upcomingInterviews?.Count(i => i.ScheduledDateTime <= DateTime.Now.AddHours(2) && i.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now) ?? 0)</h3>
                                    <p>Starting Soon</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="icon">
                                    <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                                </div>
                                <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="small-box-footer">
                                    More info <i class="fas fa-arrow-circle-right"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    @if (upcomingInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-header">
                                        <h3 class="card-title">
                                            <i class="fas fa-video mr-2"></i>
                                            Upcoming Interviews (Next 7 Days)
                                        </h3>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div class="table-responsive">
                                            <style>
                                                .modern-table {
                                                    border-radius: 8px;
                                                    overflow: hidden;
                                                }
                                                .modern-table thead {
                                                    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
                                                }
                                                .modern-table thead th {
                                                    color: white;
                                                    font-weight: 600;
                                                    padding: 12px 16px;
                                                    text-transform: uppercase;
                                                    font-size: 0.85rem;
                                                    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
                                                }
                                                .modern-table tbody td {
                                                    color: #333 !important;
                                                    font-size: 0.95rem;
                                                    vertical-align: middle;
                                                    padding: 12px 16px;
                                                }
                                                .modern-table tbody tr:hover {
                                                    background-color: #f8f9fa;
                                                }
                                            </style>
                                            <table class="table modern-table">
                                                <thead>
                                                    <tr>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-user me-2"></i>Candidate</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-briefcase me-2"></i>Position</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-calendar me-2"></i>Date & Time</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-clock me-2"></i>Duration</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>Status</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-cog me-2"></i>Actions</th>
                                                    </tr>
                                                </thead>
                                                <tbody>
                                                    @foreach (var interview in upcomingInterviews.Take(10))
                                                    {
                                                        <tr>
                                                            <td>@interview.Application?.FirstName @interview.Application?.LastName</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.JobPosting?.JobTitle</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")<br>
                                                                <small class="text-muted">@interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                                            </td>
```
