```aspnetcorerazor
                                                            <td>@interview.DurationMinutes minutes</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @if (interview.ScheduledDateTime <= DateTime.Now.AddHours(2) && interview.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now)
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark"><i class="fas fa-clock me-1"></i>Starting Soon</span>
                                                                }
                                                                else if (interview.ScheduledDateTime.Date == DateTime.Today)
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge bg-info text-white"><i class="fas fa-calendar-day me-1"></i>Today</span>
                                                                }
                                                                else
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="badge bg-secondary text-white"><i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i>Scheduled</span>
                                                                }
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("InterviewDetails", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                                                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> View
                                                                    </a>
                                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("JoinInterview", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success">
                                                                        <i class="fas fa-video"></i> Join
                                                                    </a>
                                                                </div>
                                                            </td>
                                                        </tr>
                                                    }
                                                </tbody>
                                            </table>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (completedInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-header">
                                        <h3 class="card-title">
                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle mr-2"></i>
                                            Recent Completed Interviews
                                        </h3>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div class="table-responsive">
                                            <table class="table modern-table">
                                                <thead>
                                                    <tr>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-user me-2"></i>Candidate</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-briefcase me-2"></i>Position</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-calendar me-2"></i>Completed Date</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-star me-2"></i>Rating</th>
                                                        <th><i class="fas fa-cog me-2"></i>Actions</th>
                                                    </tr>
                                                </thead>
                                                <tbody>
                                                    @foreach (var interview in completedInterviews.Take(5))
                                                    {
                                                        <tr>
                                                            <td>@interview.Application?.FirstName @interview.Application?.LastName</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.JobPosting?.JobTitle</td>
                                                            <td>@interview.CompletedDate?.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                @if (interview.InterviewRating > 0)
                                                                {
                                                                    <div class="rating">
                                                                        @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                                        {
                                                                            <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= interview.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                                        }
                                                                        <span class="ml-2">(@interview.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                                    </div>
                                                                }
                                                                else
                                                                {
                                                                    <span class="text-muted">Not rated</span>
                                                                }
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td>
                                                                <a href="@Url.Action("InterviewDetails", new { id = interview.InterviewId })" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                                                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> View Details
                                                                </a>
                                                            </td>
                                                        </tr>
                                                    }
                                                </tbody>
                                            </table>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (!upcomingInterviews?.Any() == true && !completedInterviews?.Any() == true)
                    {
                        <div class="row mt-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <div class="card">
                                    <div class="card-body text-center py-5">
                                        <i class="fas fa-video fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                                        <h4 class="text-muted">No Interviews Scheduled</h4>
                                        <p class="text-muted">You don't have any interviews scheduled at the moment.</p>
                                        <a href="@Url.Action("MyInterviews")" class="btn btn-primary">
                                            <i class="fas fa-calendar-plus mr-2"></i>View All Interviews
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

```

Updating badges in `Views/RecruitmentRecruiter/CandidateProfile.cshtml` to Bootstrap 5 syntax:


```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Application
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Candidate Profile";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h4 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-user"></i> Candidate Profile - @Model.FirstName @Model.LastName
                    </h4>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <!-- Personal Information -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Personal Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Name:</strong> @Model.FirstName @Model.LastName</p>
                            <p><strong>Email:</strong> @Model.Email</p>
                            <p><strong>Phone:</strong> @Model.PhoneNumber</p>
                            <p><strong>Address:</strong> @Model.Address</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-briefcase"></i> Professional Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Years of Experience:</strong> @Model.YearsOfExperience years</p>
                            <p><strong>Highest Qualification:</strong> @Model.HighestQualification</p>
                            <p><strong>Applied Date:</strong> @Model.SubmittedDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                            <p><strong>Application Status:</strong> <span class="badge bg-info text-white"><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-1"></i>@Model.Status</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Application Summary -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> Application Summary</h6>
                            <div class="card bg-light">
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <div class="row">
                                        <div class="col-md-6">
                                            <p><strong>Match Score:</strong> 
                                                <span class="badge badge-@(Model.MatchScore >= 70 ? "success" : "warning")">
                                                    @Model.MatchScore%
                                                </span>
                                            </p>
                                            <p><strong>Position Applied For:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.JobTitle</p>
                                            <p><strong>Department:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.Department</p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="col-md-6">
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ExtractedSkills))
                                            {
                                                <p><strong>Skills:</strong></p>
                                                <div class="mb-2">
                                                    @foreach (var skill in Model.ExtractedSkills.Split(',').Take(5))
                                                    {
                                                        <span class="badge badge-secondary mr-1">@skill.Trim()</span>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            }
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Why Suitable for Role -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-quote-left"></i> Why Suitable for Role</h6>
                            <div class="card">
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <p class="text-justify">@Model.WhySuitableForRole</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Interview History -->
                    @if (Model.Interviews.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-video"></i> Interview History</h6>
                                <div class="table-responsive">
                                    <table class="table table-sm">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Date</th>
                                                <th>Recruiter</th>
                                                <th>Rating</th>
                                                <th>Status</th>
                                                <th>Notes</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            @foreach (var interview in Model.Interviews.OrderByDescending(i => i.ScheduledDateTime))
                                            {
                                                <tr>
                                                    <td>@interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</td>
                                                    <td>@interview.RecruiterName</td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (interview.InterviewRating > 0)
                                                        {
                                                            @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                            {
                                                                <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= interview.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                            }
                                                            <span class="ml-1">(@interview.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not rated</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (interview.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge badge-success">Completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge badge-warning">Pending</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(interview.InterviewNotes))
                                                        {
                                                            <small>@(interview.InterviewNotes.Length > 50 ? interview.InterviewNotes.Substring(0, 50) + "..." : interview.InterviewNotes)</small>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <small class="text-muted">No notes</small>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            }
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <!-- Assessment Results -->
                    @if (Model.Assessments.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-clipboard-check"></i> Assessment Results</h6>
                                <div class="table-responsive">
                                    <table class="table table-sm">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Assessment</th>
                                                <th>Score</th>
                                                <th>Status</th>
                                                <th>Completed</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            @foreach (var assessment in Model.Assessments.OrderByDescending(a => a.CompletedDate))
                                            {
                                                <tr>
                                                    <td>@assessment.AssessmentTitle</td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <div class="progress" style="height: 20px;">
                                                                <div class="progress-bar @(assessment.Score >= 70 ? "bg-success" : "bg-danger")" 
                                                                     role="progressbar" style="width: @assessment.Score%">
                                                                    @assessment.Score%
                                                                </div>
                                                            </div>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            @if (assessment.IsPassed)
                                                            {
                                                                <span class="badge badge-success">Passed</span>
                                                            }
                                                            else
                                                            {
                                                                <span class="badge badge-danger">Failed</span>
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge badge-info">Pending</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.CompletedDate.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            @assessment.CompletedDate.Value.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            }
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <!-- Admin Notes -->
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.AdminNotes))
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-sticky-note"></i> Admin Notes</h6>
                                <div class="card bg-warning">
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <p class="text-justify">@Model.AdminNotes</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Documents
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="list-group">
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ResumeFilePath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.ResumeFilePath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Resume/CV
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CoverLetterPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.CoverLetterPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Cover Letter
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.IdDocumentPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.IdDocumentPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> ID Document
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CertificatesPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.CertificatesPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Certificates
                            </a>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i> Overall Assessment
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="text-center">
                        <h4 class="text-primary">@Model.MatchScore%</h4>
                        <small class="text-muted">Overall Match Score</small>
                    </div>
                    <hr>
                    @if (Model.Interviews.Any(i => i.IsCompleted))
                    {
                        var avgRating = Model.Interviews.Where(i => i.IsCompleted && i.InterviewRating > 0).Average(i => i.InterviewRating);
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-success">@avgRating.ToString("F1")/10</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">Average Interview Rating</small>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-muted">N/A</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">No interviews completed</small>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-tools"></i> Quick Actions
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-grid gap-2">
                        @if (Model.Interviews.Any())
                        {
                            var latestInterview = Model.Interviews.OrderByDescending(i => i.ScheduledDateTime).First();
                            <a asp-action="InterviewDetails" asp-route-id="@latestInterview.InterviewId" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">
                                <i class="fas fa-video"></i> View Latest Interview
                            </a>
                        }
                        <a asp-action="MyInterviews" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-list"></i> All My Interviews
                        </a>
                        <a asp-controller="RecruitmentAdmin" asp-action="Applications" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to Applications
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            // Add any JavaScript functionality here
        });
    </script>
}


```

```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Application
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Candidate Profile";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h4 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-user"></i> Candidate Profile - @Model.FirstName @Model.LastName
                    </h4>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <!-- Personal Information -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Personal Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Name:</strong> @Model.FirstName @Model.LastName</p>
                            <p><strong>Email:</strong> @Model.Email</p>
                            <p><strong>Phone:</strong> @Model.PhoneNumber</p>
                            <p><strong>Address:</strong> @Model.Address</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-briefcase"></i> Professional Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Years of Experience:</strong> @Model.YearsOfExperience years</p>
                            <p><strong>Highest Qualification:</strong> @Model.HighestQualification</p>
                            <p><strong>Applied Date:</strong> @Model.SubmittedDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                            <p><strong>Application Status:</strong> <span class="badge bg-info text-white"><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-1"></i>@Model.Status</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Application Summary -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> Application Summary</h6>
                            <div class="card bg-light">
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <div class="row">
                                        <div class="col-md-6">
                                            <p><strong>Match Score:</strong> 
                                                <span class="badge @(Model.MatchScore >= 70 ? "bg-success text-white" : "bg-warning text-dark")">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-chart-line me-1"></i>@Model.MatchScore%
                                                </span>
                                            </p>
                                            <p><strong>Position Applied For:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.JobTitle</p>
                                            <p><strong>Department:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.Department</p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="col-md-6">
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ExtractedSkills))
                                            {
                                                <p><strong>Skills:</strong></p>
                                                <div class="mb-2">
                                                    @foreach (var skill in Model.ExtractedSkills.Split(',').Take(5))
                                                    {
                                                        <span class="badge badge-secondary mr-1">@skill.Trim()</span>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            }
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Why Suitable for Role -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-quote-left"></i> Why Suitable for Role</h6>
                            <div class="card">
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <p class="text-justify">@Model.WhySuitableForRole</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Interview History -->
                    @if (Model.Interviews.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-video"></i> Interview History</h6>
                                <div class="table-responsive">
                                    <table class="table table-sm">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Date</th>
                                                <th>Recruiter</th>
                                                <th>Rating</th>
                                                <th>Status</th>
                                                <th>Notes</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            @foreach (var interview in Model.Interviews.OrderByDescending(i => i.ScheduledDateTime))
                                            {
                                                <tr>
                                                    <td>@interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</td>
                                                    <td>@interview.RecruiterName</td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (interview.InterviewRating > 0)
                                                        {
                                                            @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                            {
                                                                <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= interview.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                            }
                                                            <span class="ml-1">(@interview.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not rated</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (interview.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge badge-success">Completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge badge-warning">Pending</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(interview.InterviewNotes))
                                                        {
                                                            <small>@(interview.InterviewNotes.Length > 50 ? interview.InterviewNotes.Substring(0, 50) + "..." : interview.InterviewNotes)</small>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <small class="text-muted">No notes</small>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            }
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <!-- Assessment Results -->
                    @if (Model.Assessments.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-clipboard-check"></i> Assessment Results</h6>
                                <div class="table-responsive">
                                    <table class="table table-sm">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Assessment</th>
                                                <th>Score</th>
                                                <th>Status</th>
                                                <th>Completed</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            @foreach (var assessment in Model.Assessments.OrderByDescending(a => a.CompletedDate))
                                            {
                                                <tr>
                                                    <td>@assessment.AssessmentTitle</td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <div class="progress" style="height: 20px;">
                                                                <div class="progress-bar @(assessment.Score >= 70 ? "bg-success" : "bg-danger")" 
                                                                     role="progressbar" style="width: @assessment.Score%">
                                                                    @assessment.Score%
                                                                </div>
                                                            </div>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            @if (assessment.IsPassed)
                                                            {
                                                                <span class="badge badge-success">Passed</span>
                                                            }
                                                            else
                                                            {
                                                                <span class="badge badge-danger">Failed</span>
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge badge-info">Pending</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.CompletedDate.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            @assessment.CompletedDate.Value.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            }
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <!-- Admin Notes -->
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.AdminNotes))
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-sticky-note"></i> Admin Notes</h6>
                                <div class="card bg-warning">
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <p class="text-justify">@Model.AdminNotes</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Documents
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="list-group">
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ResumeFilePath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.ResumeFilePath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Resume/CV
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CoverLetterPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.CoverLetterPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Cover Letter
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.IdDocumentPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.IdDocumentPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> ID Document
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CertificatesPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.CertificatesPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Certificates
                            </a>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i> Overall Assessment
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="text-center">
                        <h4 class="text-primary">@Model.MatchScore%</h4>
                        <small class="text-muted">Overall Match Score</small>
                    </div>
                    <hr>
                    @if (Model.Interviews.Any(i => i.IsCompleted))
                    {
                        var avgRating = Model.Interviews.Where(i => i.IsCompleted && i.InterviewRating > 0).Average(i => i.InterviewRating);
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-success">@avgRating.ToString("F1")/10</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">Average Interview Rating</small>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-muted">N/A</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">No interviews completed</small>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-tools"></i> Quick Actions
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-grid gap-2">
                        @if (Model.Interviews.Any())
                        {
                            var latestInterview = Model.Interviews.OrderByDescending(i => i.ScheduledDateTime).First();
                            <a asp-action="InterviewDetails" asp-route-id="@latestInterview.InterviewId" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">
                                <i class="fas fa-video"></i> View Latest Interview
                            </a>
                        }
                        <a asp-action="MyInterviews" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-list"></i> All My Interviews
                        </a>
                        <a asp-controller="RecruitmentAdmin" asp-action="Applications" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to Applications
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            // Add any JavaScript functionality here
        });
    </script>
}


```

```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Application
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Candidate Profile";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h4 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-user"></i> Candidate Profile - @Model.FirstName @Model.LastName
                    </h4>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <!-- Personal Information -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Personal Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Name:</strong> @Model.FirstName @Model.LastName</p>
                            <p><strong>Email:</strong> @Model.Email</p>
                            <p><strong>Phone:</strong> @Model.PhoneNumber</p>
                            <p><strong>Address:</strong> @Model.Address</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-briefcase"></i> Professional Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Years of Experience:</strong> @Model.YearsOfExperience years</p>
                            <p><strong>Highest Qualification:</strong> @Model.HighestQualification</p>
                            <p><strong>Applied Date:</strong> @Model.SubmittedDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                            <p><strong>Application Status:</strong> <span class="badge bg-info text-white"><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-1"></i>@Model.Status</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Application Summary -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> Application Summary</h6>
                            <div class="card bg-light">
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <div class="row">
                                        <div class="col-md-6">
                                            <p><strong>Match Score:</strong> 
                                                <span class="badge @(Model.MatchScore >= 70 ? "bg-success text-white" : "bg-warning text-dark")">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-chart-line me-1"></i>@Model.MatchScore%
                                                </span>
                                            </p>
                                            <p><strong>Position Applied For:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.JobTitle</p>
                                            <p><strong>Department:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.Department</p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="col-md-6">
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ExtractedSkills))
                                            {
                                                <p><strong>Skills:</strong></p>
                                                <div class="mb-2">
                                                    @foreach (var skill in Model.ExtractedSkills.Split(',').Take(5))
                                                    {
                                                        <span class="badge bg-secondary text-white me-1">@skill.Trim()</span>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            }
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Why Suitable for Role -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-quote-left"></i> Why Suitable for Role</h6>
                            <div class="card">
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <p class="text-justify">@Model.WhySuitableForRole</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Interview History -->
                    @if (Model.Interviews.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-video"></i> Interview History</h6>
                                <div class="table-responsive">
                                    <table class="table table-sm">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Date</th>
                                                <th>Recruiter</th>
                                                <th>Rating</th>
                                                <th>Status</th>
                                                <th>Notes</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            @foreach (var interview in Model.Interviews.OrderByDescending(i => i.ScheduledDateTime))
                                            {
                                                <tr>
                                                    <td>@interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</td>
                                                    <td>@interview.RecruiterName</td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (interview.InterviewRating > 0)
                                                        {
                                                            @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                            {
                                                                <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= interview.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                            }
                                                            <span class="ml-1">(@interview.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not rated</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (interview.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge badge-success">Completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge badge-warning">Pending</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(interview.InterviewNotes))
                                                        {
                                                            <small>@(interview.InterviewNotes.Length > 50 ? interview.InterviewNotes.Substring(0, 50) + "..." : interview.InterviewNotes)</small>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <small class="text-muted">No notes</small>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            }
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <!-- Assessment Results -->
                    @if (Model.Assessments.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-clipboard-check"></i> Assessment Results</h6>
                                <div class="table-responsive">
                                    <table class="table table-sm">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Assessment</th>
                                                <th>Score</th>
                                                <th>Status</th>
                                                <th>Completed</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            @foreach (var assessment in Model.Assessments.OrderByDescending(a => a.CompletedDate))
                                            {
                                                <tr>
                                                    <td>@assessment.AssessmentTitle</td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <div class="progress" style="height: 20px;">
                                                                <div class="progress-bar @(assessment.Score >= 70 ? "bg-success" : "bg-danger")" 
                                                                     role="progressbar" style="width: @assessment.Score%">
                                                                    @assessment.Score%
                                                                </div>
                                                            </div>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            @if (assessment.IsPassed)
                                                            {
                                                                <span class="badge badge-success">Passed</span>
                                                            }
                                                            else
                                                            {
                                                                <span class="badge badge-danger">Failed</span>
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge badge-info">Pending</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.CompletedDate.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            @assessment.CompletedDate.Value.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            }
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <!-- Admin Notes -->
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.AdminNotes))
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-sticky-note"></i> Admin Notes</h6>
                                <div class="card bg-warning">
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <p class="text-justify">@Model.AdminNotes</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Documents
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="list-group">
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ResumeFilePath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.ResumeFilePath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Resume/CV
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CoverLetterPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.CoverLetterPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Cover Letter
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.IdDocumentPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.IdDocumentPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> ID Document
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CertificatesPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.CertificatesPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Certificates
                            </a>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i> Overall Assessment
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="text-center">
                        <h4 class="text-primary">@Model.MatchScore%</h4>
                        <small class="text-muted">Overall Match Score</small>
                    </div>
                    <hr>
                    @if (Model.Interviews.Any(i => i.IsCompleted))
                    {
                        var avgRating = Model.Interviews.Where(i => i.IsCompleted && i.InterviewRating > 0).Average(i => i.InterviewRating);
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-success">@avgRating.ToString("F1")/10</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">Average Interview Rating</small>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-muted">N/A</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">No interviews completed</small>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-tools"></i> Quick Actions
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-grid gap-2">
                        @if (Model.Interviews.Any())
                        {
                            var latestInterview = Model.Interviews.OrderByDescending(i => i.ScheduledDateTime).First();
                            <a asp-action="InterviewDetails" asp-route-id="@latestInterview.InterviewId" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">
                                <i class="fas fa-video"></i> View Latest Interview
                            </a>
                        }
                        <a asp-action="MyInterviews" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-list"></i> All My Interviews
                        </a>
                        <a asp-controller="RecruitmentAdmin" asp-action="Applications" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to Applications
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            // Add any JavaScript functionality here
        });
    </script>
}


```

```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Application
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Candidate Profile";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h4 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-user"></i> Candidate Profile - @Model.FirstName @Model.LastName
                    </h4>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <!-- Personal Information -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Personal Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Name:</strong> @Model.FirstName @Model.LastName</p>
                            <p><strong>Email:</strong> @Model.Email</p>
                            <p><strong>Phone:</strong> @Model.PhoneNumber</p>
                            <p><strong>Address:</strong> @Model.Address</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-briefcase"></i> Professional Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Years of Experience:</strong> @Model.YearsOfExperience years</p>
                            <p><strong>Highest Qualification:</strong> @Model.HighestQualification</p>
                            <p><strong>Applied Date:</strong> @Model.SubmittedDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                            <p><strong>Application Status:</strong> <span class="badge bg-info text-white"><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-1"></i>@Model.Status</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Application Summary -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> Application Summary</h6>
                            <div class="card bg-light">
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <div class="row">
                                        <div class="col-md-6">
                                            <p><strong>Match Score:</strong> 
                                                <span class="badge @(Model.MatchScore >= 70 ? "bg-success text-white" : "bg-warning text-dark")">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-chart-line me-1"></i>@Model.MatchScore%
                                                </span>
                                            </p>
                                            <p><strong>Position Applied For:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.JobTitle</p>
                                            <p><strong>Department:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.Department</p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="col-md-6">
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ExtractedSkills))
                                            {
                                                <p><strong>Skills:</strong></p>
                                                <div class="mb-2">
                                                    @foreach (var skill in Model.ExtractedSkills.Split(',').Take(5))
                                                    {
                                                        <span class="badge bg-secondary text-white me-1">@skill.Trim()</span>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            }
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Why Suitable for Role -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-quote-left"></i> Why Suitable for Role</h6>
                            <div class="card">
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <p class="text-justify">@Model.WhySuitableForRole</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Interview History -->
                    @if (Model.Interviews.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-video"></i> Interview History</h6>
                                <div class="table-responsive">
                                    <table class="table table-sm">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Date</th>
                                                <th>Recruiter</th>
                                                <th>Rating</th>
                                                <th>Status</th>
                                                <th>Notes</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            @foreach (var interview in Model.Interviews.OrderByDescending(i => i.ScheduledDateTime))
                                            {
                                                <tr>
                                                    <td>@interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</td>
                                                    <td>@interview.RecruiterName</td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (interview.InterviewRating > 0)
                                                        {
                                                            @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                            {
                                                                <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= interview.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                            }
                                                            <span class="ml-1">(@interview.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not rated</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (interview.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge bg-success text-white"><i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i>Completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark"><i class="fas fa-clock me-1"></i>Pending</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(interview.InterviewNotes))
                                                        {
                                                            <small>@(interview.InterviewNotes.Length > 50 ? interview.InterviewNotes.Substring(0, 50) + "..." : interview.InterviewNotes)</small>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <small class="text-muted">No notes</small>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            }
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <!-- Assessment Results -->
                    @if (Model.Assessments.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-clipboard-check"></i> Assessment Results</h6>
                                <div class="table-responsive">
                                    <table class="table table-sm">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Assessment</th>
                                                <th>Score</th>
                                                <th>Status</th>
                                                <th>Completed</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            @foreach (var assessment in Model.Assessments.OrderByDescending(a => a.CompletedDate))
                                            {
                                                <tr>
                                                    <td>@assessment.AssessmentTitle</td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <div class="progress" style="height: 20px;">
                                                                <div class="progress-bar @(assessment.Score >= 70 ? "bg-success" : "bg-danger")" 
                                                                     role="progressbar" style="width: @assessment.Score%">
                                                                    @assessment.Score%
                                                                </div>
                                                            </div>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            @if (assessment.IsPassed)
                                                            {
                                                                <span class="badge badge-success">Passed</span>
                                                            }
                                                            else
                                                            {
                                                                <span class="badge badge-danger">Failed</span>
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge badge-info">Pending</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.CompletedDate.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            @assessment.CompletedDate.Value.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            }
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <!-- Admin Notes -->
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.AdminNotes))
                    {
```
