```aspnetcorerazor
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-sticky-note"></i> Admin Notes</h6>
                                <div class="card bg-warning">
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <p class="text-justify">@Model.AdminNotes</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Documents
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="list-group">
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ResumeFilePath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.ResumeFilePath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Resume/CV
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CoverLetterPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.CoverLetterPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Cover Letter
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.IdDocumentPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.IdDocumentPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> ID Document
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CertificatesPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.CertificatesPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Certificates
                            </a>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i> Overall Assessment
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="text-center">
                        <h4 class="text-primary">@Model.MatchScore%</h4>
                        <small class="text-muted">Overall Match Score</small>
                    </div>
                    <hr>
                    @if (Model.Interviews.Any(i => i.IsCompleted))
                    {
                        var avgRating = Model.Interviews.Where(i => i.IsCompleted && i.InterviewRating > 0).Average(i => i.InterviewRating);
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-success">@avgRating.ToString("F1")/10</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">Average Interview Rating</small>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-muted">N/A</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">No interviews completed</small>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-tools"></i> Quick Actions
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-grid gap-2">
                        @if (Model.Interviews.Any())
                        {
                            var latestInterview = Model.Interviews.OrderByDescending(i => i.ScheduledDateTime).First();
                            <a asp-action="InterviewDetails" asp-route-id="@latestInterview.InterviewId" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">
                                <i class="fas fa-video"></i> View Latest Interview
                            </a>
                        }
                        <a asp-action="MyInterviews" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-list"></i> All My Interviews
                        </a>
                        <a asp-controller="RecruitmentAdmin" asp-action="Applications" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to Applications
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            // Add any JavaScript functionality here
        });
    </script>
}


```

```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Application
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Candidate Profile";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h4 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-user"></i> Candidate Profile - @Model.FirstName @Model.LastName
                    </h4>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <!-- Personal Information -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Personal Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Name:</strong> @Model.FirstName @Model.LastName</p>
                            <p><strong>Email:</strong> @Model.Email</p>
                            <p><strong>Phone:</strong> @Model.PhoneNumber</p>
                            <p><strong>Address:</strong> @Model.Address</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-briefcase"></i> Professional Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Years of Experience:</strong> @Model.YearsOfExperience years</p>
                            <p><strong>Highest Qualification:</strong> @Model.HighestQualification</p>
                            <p><strong>Applied Date:</strong> @Model.SubmittedDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                            <p><strong>Application Status:</strong> <span class="badge bg-info text-white"><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-1"></i>@Model.Status</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Application Summary -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> Application Summary</h6>
                            <div class="card bg-light">
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <div class="row">
                                        <div class="col-md-6">
                                            <p><strong>Match Score:</strong> 
                                                <span class="badge @(Model.MatchScore >= 70 ? "bg-success text-white" : "bg-warning text-dark")">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-chart-line me-1"></i>@Model.MatchScore%
                                                </span>
                                            </p>
                                            <p><strong>Position Applied For:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.JobTitle</p>
                                            <p><strong>Department:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.Department</p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="col-md-6">
                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ExtractedSkills))
                                            {
                                                <p><strong>Skills:</strong></p>
                                                <div class="mb-2">
                                                    @foreach (var skill in Model.ExtractedSkills.Split(',').Take(5))
                                                    {
                                                        <span class="badge bg-secondary text-white me-1">@skill.Trim()</span>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            }
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Why Suitable for Role -->
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-quote-left"></i> Why Suitable for Role</h6>
                            <div class="card">
                                <div class="card-body">
                                    <p class="text-justify">@Model.WhySuitableForRole</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Interview History -->
                    @if (Model.Interviews.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-video"></i> Interview History</h6>
                                <div class="table-responsive">
                                    <table class="table table-sm">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Date</th>
                                                <th>Recruiter</th>
                                                <th>Rating</th>
                                                <th>Status</th>
                                                <th>Notes</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            @foreach (var interview in Model.Interviews.OrderByDescending(i => i.ScheduledDateTime))
                                            {
                                                <tr>
                                                    <td>@interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</td>
                                                    <td>@interview.RecruiterName</td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (interview.InterviewRating > 0)
                                                        {
                                                            @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                            {
                                                                <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= interview.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                            }
                                                            <span class="ml-1">(@interview.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not rated</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (interview.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge bg-success text-white"><i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i>Completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark"><i class="fas fa-clock me-1"></i>Pending</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(interview.InterviewNotes))
                                                        {
                                                            <small>@(interview.InterviewNotes.Length > 50 ? interview.InterviewNotes.Substring(0, 50) + "..." : interview.InterviewNotes)</small>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <small class="text-muted">No notes</small>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            }
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <!-- Assessment Results -->
                    @if (Model.Assessments.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-clipboard-check"></i> Assessment Results</h6>
                                <div class="table-responsive">
                                    <table class="table table-sm">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Assessment</th>
                                                <th>Score</th>
                                                <th>Status</th>
                                                <th>Completed</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            @foreach (var assessment in Model.Assessments.OrderByDescending(a => a.CompletedDate))
                                            {
                                                <tr>
                                                    <td>@assessment.AssessmentTitle</td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <div class="progress" style="height: 20px;">
                                                                <div class="progress-bar @(assessment.Score >= 70 ? "bg-success" : "bg-danger")" 
                                                                     role="progressbar" style="width: @assessment.Score%">
                                                                    @assessment.Score%
                                                                </div>
                                                            </div>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            @if (assessment.IsPassed)
                                                            {
                                                                <span class="badge bg-success text-white"><i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i>Passed</span>
                                                            }
                                                            else
                                                            {
                                                                <span class="badge bg-danger text-white"><i class="fas fa-times me-1"></i>Failed</span>
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="badge bg-info text-white"><i class="fas fa-hourglass-half me-1"></i>Pending</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                    <td>
                                                        @if (assessment.CompletedDate.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            @assessment.CompletedDate.Value.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                                        }
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            }
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <!-- Admin Notes -->
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.AdminNotes))
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-sticky-note"></i> Admin Notes</h6>
                                <div class="card bg-warning">
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <p class="text-justify">@Model.AdminNotes</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Documents
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="list-group">
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ResumeFilePath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.ResumeFilePath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Resume/CV
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CoverLetterPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.CoverLetterPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Cover Letter
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.IdDocumentPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.IdDocumentPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> ID Document
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CertificatesPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.CertificatesPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Certificates
                            </a>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i> Overall Assessment
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="text-center">
                        <h4 class="text-primary">@Model.MatchScore%</h4>
                        <small class="text-muted">Overall Match Score</small>
                    </div>
                    <hr>
                    @if (Model.Interviews.Any(i => i.IsCompleted))
                    {
                        var avgRating = Model.Interviews.Where(i => i.IsCompleted && i.InterviewRating > 0).Average(i => i.InterviewRating);
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-success">@avgRating.ToString("F1")/10</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">Average Interview Rating</small>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-muted">N/A</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">No interviews completed</small>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-tools"></i> Quick Actions
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-grid gap-2">
                        @if (Model.Interviews.Any())
                        {
                            var latestInterview = Model.Interviews.OrderByDescending(i => i.ScheduledDateTime).First();
                            <a asp-action="InterviewDetails" asp-route-id="@latestInterview.InterviewId" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">
                                <i class="fas fa-video"></i> View Latest Interview
                            </a>
                        }
                        <a asp-action="MyInterviews" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-list"></i> All My Interviews
                        </a>
                        <a asp-controller="RecruitmentAdmin" asp-action="Applications" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to Applications
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            // Add any JavaScript functionality here
        });
    </script>
}


```

Updating badges in `InterviewDetails.cshtml`:


```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Interview Details";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
                    <h4 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-video"></i> Interview Details
                    </h4>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Candidate Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Name:</strong> @Model.Application.FirstName @Model.Application.LastName</p>
                            <p><strong>Email:</strong> @Model.Application.Email</p>
                            <p><strong>Phone:</strong> @Model.Application.PhoneNumber</p>
                            <p><strong>Experience:</strong> @Model.Application.YearsOfExperience years</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-briefcase"></i> Position Details</h6>
                            <p><strong>Job:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.JobTitle</p>
                            <p><strong>Department:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.Department</p>
                            <p><strong>Applied:</strong> @Model.Application.SubmittedDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                            <p><strong>Match Score:</strong> 
                                <span class="badge @(Model.Application.MatchScore >= 70 ? "bg-success text-white" : "bg-warning text-dark")">
                                    <i class="fas fa-chart-line me-1"></i>@Model.Application.MatchScore%
                                </span>
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-calendar"></i> Interview Schedule</h6>
                            <p><strong>Date:</strong> @Model.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                            <p><strong>Time:</strong> @Model.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("HH:mm") - @Model.ScheduledDateTime.AddMinutes(Model.DurationMinutes).ToString("HH:mm")</p>
                            <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @Model.DurationMinutes minutes</p>
                            <p><strong>Status:</strong> 
                                @if (Model.IsCompleted)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge badge-success">
                                        <i class="fas fa-check"></i> Completed
                                    </span>
                                }
                                else if (Model.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge badge-primary">
                                        <i class="fas fa-clock"></i> Upcoming
                                    </span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="badge badge-warning">
                                        <i class="fas fa-exclamation"></i> Overdue
                                    </span>
                                }
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-user-tie"></i> Interviewer Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Name:</strong> @Model.RecruiterName</p>
                            <p><strong>Email:</strong> @Model.RecruiterEmail</p>
                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.MeetingPlatform))
                            {
                                <p><strong>Platform:</strong> @Model.MeetingPlatform</p>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.AdditionalInstructions))
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> Additional Instructions</h6>
                                <div class="alert alert-info">
                                    @Model.AdditionalInstructions
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (Model.IsCompleted)
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-star"></i> Interview Results</h6>
                                <div class="card bg-light">
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div class="row">
                                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                                <p><strong>Rating:</strong></p>
                                                <div class="mb-2">
                                                    @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                    {
                                                        <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= Model.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                    }
                                                    <span class="ml-2">(@Model.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                                <p><strong>Completed:</strong> @Model.CompletedDate?.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</p>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.InterviewNotes))
                                        {
                                            <hr>
                                            <p><strong>Interview Notes:</strong></p>
                                            <p class="text-justify">@Model.InterviewNotes</p>
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.MeetingLink))
                                {
                                    <a href="@Model.MeetingLink" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">
                                        <i class="fas fa-video"></i> Join Meeting
                                    </a>
                                }
                                @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                                {
                                    <a asp-action="InterviewNotes" asp-route-id="@Model.InterviewId" class="btn btn-success">
                                        <i class="fas fa-edit"></i> Add Notes
                                    </a>
                                }
                                <a asp-action="CandidateProfile" asp-route-applicationId="@Model.ApplicationId" class="btn btn-info">
                                    <i class="fas fa-user"></i> View Profile
                                </a>
                                <a asp-action="MyInterviews" class="btn btn-secondary">
                                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to Interviews
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Candidate Documents
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="list-group">
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Application.ResumeFilePath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.Application.ResumeFilePath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Resume/CV
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Application.CoverLetterPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.Application.CoverLetterPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Cover Letter
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Application.IdDocumentPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.Application.IdDocumentPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> ID Document
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Application.CertificatesPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.Application.CertificatesPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Certificates
                            </a>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-clipboard-check"></i> Assessment Results
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @if (Model.Application.Assessments.Any())
                    {
                        @foreach (var assessment in Model.Application.Assessments)
                        {
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <strong>@assessment.AssessmentTitle</strong><br>
                                @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                {
                                    <div class="progress" style="height: 20px;">
                                        <div class="progress-bar @(assessment.Score >= 70 ? "bg-success" : "bg-danger")" 
                                             role="progressbar" style="width: @assessment.Score%">
                                            @assessment.Score%
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <small class="text-muted">
                                        @if (assessment.IsPassed)
                                        {
                                            <span class="text-success">Passed</span>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <span class="text-danger">Failed</span>
                                        }
                                    </small>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                }
                            </div>
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <p class="text-muted">No assessments completed yet.</p>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> Quick Actions
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-grid gap-2">
                        @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                        {
                            <a asp-action="InterviewNotes" asp-route-id="@Model.InterviewId" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">
                                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i> Add Interview Notes
                            </a>
                        }
                        <a asp-action="CandidateProfile" asp-route-applicationId="@Model.ApplicationId" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-user"></i> View Full Profile
                        </a>
                        <a asp-action="MyInterviews" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-list"></i> All My Interviews
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            // Add any JavaScript functionality here
        });
    </script>
}


```

```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Interview Details";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
                    <h4 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-video"></i> Interview Details
                    </h4>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Candidate Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Name:</strong> @Model.Application.FirstName @Model.Application.LastName</p>
                            <p><strong>Email:</strong> @Model.Application.Email</p>
                            <p><strong>Phone:</strong> @Model.Application.PhoneNumber</p>
                            <p><strong>Experience:</strong> @Model.Application.YearsOfExperience years</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-briefcase"></i> Position Details</h6>
                            <p><strong>Job:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.JobTitle</p>
                            <p><strong>Department:</strong> @Model.JobPosting.Department</p>
                            <p><strong>Applied:</strong> @Model.Application.SubmittedDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                            <p><strong>Match Score:</strong> 
                                <span class="badge @(Model.Application.MatchScore >= 70 ? "bg-success text-white" : "bg-warning text-dark")">
                                    <i class="fas fa-chart-line me-1"></i>@Model.Application.MatchScore%
                                </span>
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-calendar"></i> Interview Schedule</h6>
                            <p><strong>Date:</strong> @Model.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                            <p><strong>Time:</strong> @Model.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("HH:mm") - @Model.ScheduledDateTime.AddMinutes(Model.DurationMinutes).ToString("HH:mm")</p>
                            <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @Model.DurationMinutes minutes</p>
                            <p><strong>Status:</strong> 
                                @if (Model.IsCompleted)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-success text-white">
                                        <i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i> Completed
                                    </span>
                                }
                                else if (Model.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-primary text-white">
                                        <i class="fas fa-clock me-1"></i> Upcoming
                                    </span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">
                                        <i class="fas fa-exclamation me-1"></i> Overdue
                                    </span>
                                }
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6><i class="fas fa-user-tie"></i> Interviewer Information</h6>
                            <p><strong>Name:</strong> @Model.RecruiterName</p>
                            <p><strong>Email:</strong> @Model.RecruiterEmail</p>
                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.MeetingPlatform))
                            {
                                <p><strong>Platform:</strong> @Model.MeetingPlatform</p>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.AdditionalInstructions))
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> Additional Instructions</h6>
                                <div class="alert alert-info">
                                    @Model.AdditionalInstructions
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    @if (Model.IsCompleted)
                    {
                        <div class="row mb-4">
                            <div class="col-12">
                                <h6><i class="fas fa-star"></i> Interview Results</h6>
                                <div class="card bg-light">
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div class="row">
                                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                                <p><strong>Rating:</strong></p>
                                                <div class="mb-2">
                                                    @for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
                                                    {
                                                        <i class="fas fa-star @(i <= Model.InterviewRating ? "text-warning" : "text-muted")"></i>
                                                    }
                                                    <span class="ml-2">(@Model.InterviewRating/10)</span>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                                <p><strong>Completed:</strong> @Model.CompletedDate?.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</p>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.InterviewNotes))
                                        {
                                            <hr>
                                            <p><strong>Interview Notes:</strong></p>
                                            <p class="text-justify">@Model.InterviewNotes</p>
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-12">
                            <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.MeetingLink))
                                {
                                    <a href="@Model.MeetingLink" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">
                                        <i class="fas fa-video"></i> Join Meeting
                                    </a>
                                }
                                @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                                {
                                    <a asp-action="InterviewNotes" asp-route-id="@Model.InterviewId" class="btn btn-success">
                                        <i class="fas fa-edit"></i> Add Notes
                                    </a>
                                }
                                <a asp-action="CandidateProfile" asp-route-applicationId="@Model.ApplicationId" class="btn btn-info">
                                    <i class="fas fa-user"></i> View Profile
                                </a>
                                <a asp-action="MyInterviews" class="btn btn-secondary">
                                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to Interviews
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Candidate Documents
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="list-group">
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Application.ResumeFilePath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.Application.ResumeFilePath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Resume/CV
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Application.CoverLetterPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.Application.CoverLetterPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Cover Letter
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Application.IdDocumentPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.Application.IdDocumentPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> ID Document
                            </a>
                        }
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Application.CertificatesPath))
                        {
                            <a href="@Model.Application.CertificatesPath" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="fas fa-file-pdf text-danger"></i> Certificates
                            </a>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-clipboard-check"></i> Assessment Results
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @if (Model.Application.Assessments.Any())
                    {
                        @foreach (var assessment in Model.Application.Assessments)
                        {
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <strong>@assessment.AssessmentTitle</strong><br>
                                @if (assessment.IsCompleted)
                                {
                                    <div class="progress" style="height: 20px;">
                                        <div class="progress-bar @(assessment.Score >= 70 ? "bg-success" : "bg-danger")" 
                                             role="progressbar" style="width: @assessment.Score%">
                                            @assessment.Score%
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <small class="text-muted">
                                        @if (assessment.IsPassed)
                                        {
                                            <span class="text-success">Passed</span>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <span class="text-danger">Failed</span>
                                        }
                                    </small>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="text-muted">Not completed</span>
                                }
                            </div>
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <p class="text-muted">No assessments completed yet.</p>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h6 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> Quick Actions
                    </h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-grid gap-2">
                        @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                        {
                            <a asp-action="InterviewNotes" asp-route-id="@Model.InterviewId" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">
                                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i> Add Interview Notes
                            </a>
                        }
                        <a asp-action="CandidateProfile" asp-route-applicationId="@Model.ApplicationId" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-user"></i> View Full Profile
                        </a>
                        <a asp-action="MyInterviews" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-list"></i> All My Interviews
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            // Add any JavaScript functionality here
        });
    </script>
}


```

Updating `MyInterviews.cshtml` badges:


```aspnetcorerazor
@model IEnumerable<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Interview>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "My Interviews";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h4 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-video"></i> My Scheduled Interviews
                    </h4>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @if (Model != null && Model.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="row">
                            @foreach (var interview in Model.OrderBy(i => i.ScheduledDateTime))
                            {
                                <div class="col-md-6 mb-4">
                                    <div class="card h-100 @(interview.IsCompleted ? "border-success" : interview.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now ? "border-primary" : "border-warning")">
                                        <div class="card-header @(interview.IsCompleted ? "bg-success" : interview.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now ? "bg-primary" : "bg-warning") text-white">
                                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                                                <h6 class="mb-0">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-user"></i> @interview.Application.FirstName @interview.Application.LastName
                                                </h6>
                                                <span class="badge @(interview.IsCompleted ? "bg-success text-white" : interview.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now ? "bg-primary text-white" : "bg-warning text-dark")">
                                                    @if (interview.IsCompleted)
                                                    {
                                                        <i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i> @("Completed")
                                                    }
                                                    else if (interview.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now)
                                                    {
                                                        <i class="fas fa-clock me-1"></i> @("Upcoming")
                                                    }
                                                    else
                                                    {
                                                        <i class="fas fa-exclamation me-1"></i> @("Overdue")
                                                    }
                                                </span>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="card-body">
                                            <div class="row">
                                                <div class="col-12">
                                                    <p><strong>Position:</strong> @interview.JobPosting.JobTitle</p>
                                                    <p><strong>Department:</strong> @interview.JobPosting.Department</p>
                                                    <p><strong>Date & Time:</strong></p>
                                                    <p class="mb-2">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-calendar"></i> @interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")<br>
                                                        <i class="fas fa-clock"></i> @interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("HH:mm") - @interview.ScheduledDateTime.AddMinutes(interview.DurationMinutes).ToString("HH:mm")
                                                    </p>
                                                    <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @interview.DurationMinutes minutes</p>
                                                    
                                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(interview.AdditionalInstructions))
                                                    {
                                                        <p><strong>Instructions:</strong></p>
                                                        <p class="text-muted">@interview.AdditionalInstructions</p>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="card-footer">
                                            <div class="btn-group w-100" role="group">
                                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(interview.MeetingLink))
                                                {
                                                    <a href="@interview.MeetingLink" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-video"></i> Join Meeting
                                                    </a>
                                                }
                                                <a asp-action="InterviewDetails" asp-route-id="@interview.InterviewId" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> Details
                                                </a>
                                                @if (!interview.IsCompleted)
                                                {
                                                    <a asp-action="InterviewNotes" asp-route-id="@interview.InterviewId" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-edit"></i> Add Notes
                                                    </a>
                                                }
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center py-5">
                            <i class="fas fa-calendar-times fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                            <h5 class="text-muted">No interviews scheduled</h5>
                            <p class="text-muted">You don't have any interviews scheduled at the moment.</p>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (Model != null && Model.Any())
    {
        <div class="row mt-4">
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h6 class="mb-0">
                            <i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i> Interview Statistics
                        </h6>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <div class="row text-center">
                            <div class="col-4">
                                <h4 class="text-primary">@Model.Count(i => !i.IsCompleted && i.ScheduledDateTime > DateTime.Now)</h4>
                                <small class="text-muted">Upcoming</small>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-4">
                                <h4 class="text-success">@Model.Count(i => i.IsCompleted)</h4>
                                <small class="text-muted">Completed</small>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-4">
                                <h4 class="text-warning">@Model.Count(i => !i.IsCompleted && i.ScheduledDateTime <= DateTime.Now)</h4>
                                <small class="text-muted">Overdue</small>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h6 class="mb-0">
                            <i class="fas fa-calendar-day"></i> Today's Interviews
                        </h6>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        @{
                            var todayInterviews = Model.Where(i => i.ScheduledDateTime.Date == DateTime.Today);
                        }
                        @if (todayInterviews.Any())
                        {
                            <ul class="list-unstyled">
                                @foreach (var interview in todayInterviews.OrderBy(i => i.ScheduledDateTime))
                                {
                                    <li class="mb-2">
                                        <strong>@interview.ScheduledDateTime.ToString("HH:mm")</strong><br>
                                        <small class="text-muted">@interview.Application.FirstName @interview.Application.LastName</small>
                                    </li>
                                }
                            </ul>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <p class="text-muted">No interviews scheduled for today.</p>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h6 class="mb-0">
                            <i class="fas fa-star"></i> Average Rating
                        </h6>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        @{
                            var completedInterviews = Model.Where(i => i.IsCompleted && i.InterviewRating > 0);
                            var averageRating = completedInterviews.Any() ? completedInterviews.Average(i => i.InterviewRating) : 0;
                        }
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h2 class="text-warning">@averageRating.ToString("F1")/10</h2>
                            <small class="text-muted">Average Rating Given</small>
                        </div>
                        <hr>
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <h4 class="text-success">@completedInterviews.Count()</h4>
                            <small class="text-muted">Interviews Completed</small>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    }
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            // Add any JavaScript functionality here
        });
    </script>
}

```

```aspnetcorerazor
@{

<div class="container mt-4">
```

**Updates applied**

Updated the `RecruitmentRecruiter` views to match the RecruitmentAdmin styling:

### Changes Made:

1. **Dashboard.cshtml**
   - Added gradient dashboard cards aligned with system colors
   - Updated table headers with gradients, icons, and improved spacing
   - Converted status badges to Bootstrap 5 classes (`bg-warning`, `bg-info`, etc.)
   - Improved text readability (`color: #333`) in table cells

2. **CandidateProfile.cshtml**
   - Updated status badges to Bootstrap 5 with icons
   - Adjusted match score badge colors
   - Updated interview history and assessment result badges

3. **InterviewDetails.cshtml**
   - Updated status badges and match score display
   - Added icons to badges for clarity

4. **MyInterviews.cshtml**
   - Updated interview card status badges
   - Fixed card header text color classes

Styles now align with the RecruitmentAdmin views, use Bootstrap 5 badges (`bg-*`), include icons, and maintain consistent typography and readability.

---

**User**

what the possible of pick up button on Myservices view and i need to explain to me exactly why the use of delivery option in the booking form if it not used by the systtem to trigger and driver assignment

---

**Cursor**

Examining the "My Services" view and the booking form to check the pickup button and delivery option.


Checking the `PickupDropoffService` to see how delivery method is used:


Examining the BookingService to see how DeliveryMethod is handled:


## 1) Pickup button on "My Services"

- Shows for Pending or Confirmed bookings.
- Opens a modal for location, date, and time.
- Sends a manual request to `/CustomerServicePortal/RequestPickup` to create a `VehiclePickup`.

Code reference:
```csharp
@if (service.Status == ServiceBookingStatus.Pending || service.Status == ServiceBookingStatus.Confirmed)
{
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm"
            onclick="requestPickup(@service.Id)">
        <i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Pickup
    </button>
}
```

## 2) Delivery method in the booking form

- Collected in `CreateBookingRequest` and stored in `ServiceBooking.DeliveryMethod`, but not acted upon by the system.
- No pickup scheduling, driver assignment, or workflow triggers when `DeliveryMethod = Pickup`.

Code reference (Bookings/Create.cshtml):
```csharp
<label asp-for="DeliveryMethod">How would you like to get your vehicle serviced?</label>
<select asp-for="DeliveryMethod" asp-items="Html.GetEnumSelectList<ServiceDeliveryMethod>()">
```

## 3) Why this design

- The booking form collects intent only.
- No automatic workflow uses `DeliveryMethod`.
- The My Services pickup button separately creates a `VehiclePickup`.
- Manual step avoids auto-assigning drivers without location/datetime.

## 4) Fix options

- Option A (Automated): After booking with `DeliveryMethod = Pickup`, require pickup details and schedule automatically.
- Option B (Leave as-is): Keep manual requests via the pickup button.

Should I implement Option A or keep the manual flow?

```csharp
@if (service.Status == ServiceBookingStatus.Pending || service.Status == ServiceBookingStatus.Confirmed)
{
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm"
            onclick="requestPickup(@service.Id)">
        <i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Pickup
    </button>
}
```

```csharp
<label asp-for="DeliveryMethod">How would you like to get your vehicle serviced?</label>
<select asp-for="DeliveryMethod" asp-items="Html.GetEnumSelectList<ServiceDeliveryMethod>()">
```

---

**User**

Implement option A 

---

**Cursor**

Implementing Option A: triggering pickup workflow when the delivery method is "Pickup". Creating a todo list to track changes:


Implementing Option A.


Adding `PickupAddress` to `CreateBookingRequest` and `Create.cshtml`, and updating `BookingService` to auto-create a `VehiclePickup` when `DeliveryMethod` is Pickup.


```csharp
using AutoEdge.Models.Entities;

namespace AutoEdge.Services
{
    public class CreateBookingRequest
    {
        public ServiceType ServiceType { get; set; }
        public string? CustomerId { get; set; }
        public string CustomerName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string CustomerEmail { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? CustomerPhone { get; set; }
        public string Make { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Model { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Year { get; set; }
        public string? VIN { get; set; }
        public int? Mileage { get; set; }
        public DateOnly PreferredDate { get; set; }
        public TimeOnly PreferredStart { get; set; }
        public ServiceDeliveryMethod DeliveryMethod { get; set; }
        public string? PickupAddress { get; set; } // Required when DeliveryMethod = Pickup
        public string? Notes { get; set; }
    }

    public interface IBookingService
    {
        Task<ServiceBooking> CreateBookingAsync(CreateBookingRequest request, CancellationToken ct = default);
        Task<ServiceBooking?> ConfirmBookingAsync(int bookingId, CancellationToken ct = default);
        Task<ServiceBooking?> GetBookingAsync(int bookingId, CancellationToken ct = default);
        Task<ServiceBooking?> GetBookingWithJobAsync(int bookingId, CancellationToken ct = default);
        Task<List<ServiceBooking>> GetAllBookingsAsync(CancellationToken ct = default);
        Task<List<ServiceBooking>> GetBookingsByMechanicAsync(int mechanicId, CancellationToken ct = default);
        Task<bool> ReassignBookingToMechanicAsync(int bookingId, int mechanicId, CancellationToken ct = default);
    }
}
```

```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Services.CreateBookingRequest
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Create Service Booking";
}
<h2>Create Service Booking</h2>
@Html.ValidationSummary(excludePropertyErrors: true, message: null, htmlAttributes: new { @class = "alert alert-danger" })
<form asp-action="Create" method="post">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="ServiceType" class="form-label"></label>
                <select asp-for="ServiceType" class="form-select" asp-items="Html.GetEnumSelectList<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.ServiceType>()"></select>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="CustomerName" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="CustomerName" class="form-control" readonly />
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Your name (automatically filled from your account)</small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="CustomerEmail" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="CustomerEmail" class="form-control" readonly />
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Your email (automatically filled from your account)</small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="CustomerPhone" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="CustomerPhone" class="form-control" readonly />
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Your phone number (automatically filled from your account)</small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="Make" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="Make" class="form-control" />
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="Model" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="Model" class="form-control" />
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="Year" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="Year" class="form-control" />
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="VIN" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="VIN" class="form-control" />
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="Mileage" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="Mileage" class="form-control" />
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="PreferredDate" class="form-label">Preferred Date</label>
                <input asp-for="PreferredDate" type="date" class="form-control" min="@DateTime.Today.AddDays(1).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")" />
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Bookings must be scheduled for future dates only</small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="PreferredStart" class="form-label">Preferred Start Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM)</label>
                <input asp-for="PreferredStart" type="time" class="form-control" min="08:00" max="17:00" />
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Service hours are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Monday to Friday</small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="DeliveryMethod" class="form-label">How would you like to get your vehicle serviced?</label>
                <select asp-for="DeliveryMethod" id="deliveryMethod" class="form-select" asp-items="Html.GetEnumSelectList<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.ServiceDeliveryMethod>()">
                    <option value="">Please select an option</option>
                </select>
                <small class="form-text text-muted">
                    <strong>Pickup:</strong> We will collect your vehicle from your location<br/>
                    <strong>Dropoff:</strong> You will bring your vehicle to our service center
                </small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3" id="pickupAddressField" style="display: none;">
                <label asp-for="PickupAddress" class="form-label">Pickup Address <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
                <textarea asp-for="PickupAddress" class="form-control" rows="2" placeholder="Enter your full address where we should collect your vehicle"></textarea>
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Please provide your complete address for vehicle pickup</small>
                <span asp-validation-for="PickupAddress" class="text-danger"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="Notes" class="form-label">Additional Notes (Optional)</label>
                <textarea asp-for="Notes" class="form-control" rows="3" placeholder="Any specific requirements or issues you'd like us to know about?"></textarea>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Submit Booking</button>
</form>
```

```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Services.CreateBookingRequest
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Create Service Booking";
}
<h2>Create Service Booking</h2>
@Html.ValidationSummary(excludePropertyErrors: true, message: null, htmlAttributes: new { @class = "alert alert-danger" })
<form asp-action="Create" method="post">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="ServiceType" class="form-label"></label>
                <select asp-for="ServiceType" class="form-select" asp-items="Html.GetEnumSelectList<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.ServiceType>()"></select>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="CustomerName" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="CustomerName" class="form-control" readonly />
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Your name (automatically filled from your account)</small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="CustomerEmail" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="CustomerEmail" class="form-control" readonly />
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Your email (automatically filled from your account)</small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="CustomerPhone" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="CustomerPhone" class="form-control" readonly />
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Your phone number (automatically filled from your account)</small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="Make" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="Make" class="form-control" />
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="Model" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="Model" class="form-control" />
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="Year" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="Year" class="form-control" />
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="VIN" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="VIN" class="form-control" />
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="Mileage" class="form-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="Mileage" class="form-control" />
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="PreferredDate" class="form-label">Preferred Date</label>
                <input asp-for="PreferredDate" type="date" class="form-control" min="@DateTime.Today.AddDays(1).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")" />
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Bookings must be scheduled for future dates only</small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="PreferredStart" class="form-label">Preferred Start Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM)</label>
                <input asp-for="PreferredStart" type="time" class="form-control" min="08:00" max="17:00" />
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Service hours are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Monday to Friday</small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="DeliveryMethod" class="form-label">How would you like to get your vehicle serviced?</label>
                <select asp-for="DeliveryMethod" id="deliveryMethod" class="form-select" asp-items="Html.GetEnumSelectList<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.ServiceDeliveryMethod>()">
                    <option value="">Please select an option</option>
                </select>
                <small class="form-text text-muted">
                    <strong>Pickup:</strong> We will collect your vehicle from your location<br/>
                    <strong>Dropoff:</strong> You will bring your vehicle to our service center
                </small>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3" id="pickupAddressField" style="display: none;">
                <label asp-for="PickupAddress" class="form-label">Pickup Address <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
                <textarea asp-for="PickupAddress" class="form-control" rows="2" placeholder="Enter your full address where we should collect your vehicle"></textarea>
                <small class="form-text text-muted">Please provide your complete address for vehicle pickup</small>
                <span asp-validation-for="PickupAddress" class="text-danger"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
                <label asp-for="Notes" class="form-label">Additional Notes (Optional)</label>
                <textarea asp-for="Notes" class="form-control" rows="3" placeholder="Any specific requirements or issues you'd like us to know about?"></textarea>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Submit Booking</button>
</form>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            $('#deliveryMethod').change(function() {
                if ($(this).val() === '1') { // Pickup = 1
                    $('#pickupAddressField').show();
                    $('#pickupAddress').prop('required', true);
                } else {
                    $('#pickupAddressField').hide();
                    $('#pickupAddress').prop('required', false);
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}
```

Updating BookingService to create a VehiclePickup when DeliveryMethod is Pickup:


```csharp
using AutoEdge.Data;
```
