```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using AutoEdge.Data;
using AutoEdge.Models.Entities;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity;

namespace AutoEdge.Controllers
{
    [Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
    public class DriverController : Controller
    {
        private readonly ApplicationDbContext _context;
        private readonly UserManager<ApplicationUser> _userManager;

        public DriverController(ApplicationDbContext context, UserManager<ApplicationUser> userManager)
        {
            _context = context;
            _userManager = userManager;
        }

        public async Task<IActionResult> Dashboard()
        {
            var currentUser = await _userManager.GetUserAsync(User);
            if (currentUser == null)
            {
                return RedirectToAction("Login", "Account");
            }

            // Get the Driver entity for this user
            var driver = await _context.Drivers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.UserId == currentUser.Id);
            int? driverId = driver?.Id;

            // Get deliveries assigned to this driver
            var assignedDeliveries = await _context.Deliveries
                .Include(d => d.Contract)
                    .ThenInclude(c => c.Customer)
                        .ThenInclude(cu => cu.User)
                .Include(d => d.Contract)
                    .ThenInclude(c => c.Vehicle)
                .Where(d => d.DriverUserId == currentUser.Id)
                .OrderBy(d => d.ScheduledDate)
                .ToListAsync();

            // Get pickups assigned to this driver
            var assignedPickups = new List<VehiclePickup>();
            if (driverId.HasValue)
            {
                assignedPickups = await _context.VehiclePickups
                    .Include(p => p.ServiceBooking)
                        .ThenInclude(sb => sb.Customer)
                    .Where(p => p.DriverId == driverId.Value)
                    .OrderBy(p => p.PickupDate)
                    .ThenBy(p => p.PickupTime)
                    .ToListAsync();
            }

            // Calculate combined statistics
            var totalDeliveries = assignedDeliveries.Count;
            var totalPickups = assignedPickups.Count;
            var totalAssignments = totalDeliveries + totalPickups;
            
            var completedDeliveries = assignedDeliveries.Count(d => d.Status == "Delivered");
            var completedPickups = assignedPickups.Count(p => p.PickupStatus == "Completed" || p.PickupStatus == "Delivered");
            
            var pendingDeliveries = assignedDeliveries.Count(d => d.Status == "Pending" || d.Status == "In Transit");
            var pendingPickups = assignedPickups.Count(p => p.PickupStatus == "Scheduled" || p.PickupStatus == "Assigned" || p.PickupStatus == "EnRoute");
            
            var todayDeliveries = assignedDeliveries.Count(d => d.ScheduledDate.Date == DateTime.Today);
            var todayPickups = assignedPickups.Count(p => p.PickupDate.Date == DateTime.Today);
            
            var totalCompleted = completedDeliveries + completedPickups;
            var totalPending = pendingDeliveries + pendingPickups;
            var totalToday = todayDeliveries + todayPickups;

            ViewBag.TotalDeliveries = totalAssignments;
            ViewBag.CompletedDeliveries = totalCompleted;
            ViewBag.PendingDeliveries = totalPending;
            ViewBag.TodayDeliveries = totalToday;
            ViewBag.DriverName = currentUser.UserName;
            
            // Pass both lists to the view
            ViewBag.AssignedDeliveries = assignedDeliveries;
            ViewBag.AssignedPickups = assignedPickups;

            return View(assignedDeliveries);
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<IActionResult> UpdateDeliveryStatus(int deliveryId, string status)
        {
            var delivery = await _context.Deliveries.FindAsync(deliveryId);
            if (delivery == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var currentUser = await _userManager.GetUserAsync(User);
            if (delivery.DriverUserId != currentUser.Id)
            {
                return Forbid();
            }

            delivery.Status = status;
            if (status == "Delivered")
            {
                delivery.CompletedDate = DateTime.Now;
            }

            await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Dashboard));
        }

        public async Task<IActionResult> DeliveryDetails(int id)
        {
            var delivery = await _context.Deliveries
                .Include(d => d.Contract)
                    .ThenInclude(c => c.Customer)
                        .ThenInclude(cu => cu.User)
                .Include(d => d.Contract)
                    .ThenInclude(c => c.Vehicle)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.Id == id);

            if (delivery == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var currentUser = await _userManager.GetUserAsync(User);
            if (delivery.DriverUserId != currentUser.Id)
            {
                return Forbid();
            }

            return View(delivery);
        }
    }
}
```

Updating the view to use the `Customer` property:


```aspnetcorerazor
@model IEnumerable<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Delivery>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Driver Dashboard";
    Layout = "~/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml";
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h2><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Driver Dashboard</h2>
                <div class="text-muted">
                    Welcome, <strong>@ViewBag.DriverName</strong>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Statistics Cards -->
    <div class="row mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-primary text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.TotalDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Total Deliveries</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-boxes fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-success text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.CompletedDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Completed</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-warning text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.PendingDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Pending</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-clock fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-info text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.TodayDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Today's Deliveries</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-calendar-day fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Deliveries Table -->
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-list"></i> My Assigned Deliveries
                    </h5>
                    <a href="@Url.Action("ScanQRCode", "Delivery")" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-qrcode me-1"></i> Scan QR Code
                    </a>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @if (Model.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="table-responsive">
                            <table class="table table-striped table-hover">
                                <thead class="table-dark">
                                    <tr>
                                        <th>Delivery ID</th>
                                        <th>Customer</th>
                                        <th>Vehicle</th>
                                        <th>Scheduled Date</th>
                                        <th>Delivery Address</th>
                                        <th>Status</th>
                                        <th>Actions</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    @foreach (var delivery in Model)
                                    {
                                        <tr>
                                            <td>
                                                <strong>#@delivery.Id</strong>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (delivery.Contract?.Customer != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@delivery.Contract.Customer.User.FirstName @delivery.Contract.Customer.User.LastName</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@delivery.Contract.Customer.User.Email</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">N/A</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (delivery.Contract?.Vehicle != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@delivery.Contract.Vehicle.Year @delivery.Contract.Vehicle.Make @delivery.Contract.Vehicle.Model</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">Color: @delivery.Contract.Vehicle.ExteriorColor</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">N/A</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                <div>
                                    <strong>@delivery.ScheduledDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</strong><br>
                                    <small class="text-muted">@delivery.ScheduledDate.ToString("hh:mm tt")</small>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(delivery.DeliveryAddress))
                                                {
                                                    <small>@delivery.DeliveryAddress</small>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">Address not provided</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @switch (delivery.Status)
                                                {
                                                    case "Pending":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-warning">Pending</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "In Transit":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-info">In Transit</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Delivered":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Delivered</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Cancelled":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-danger">Cancelled</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    default:
                                                        <span class="badge bg-secondary">@delivery.Status</span>
                                                        break;
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("DeliveryDetails", new { id = delivery.Id })" 
                                                       class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" title="View Details">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                                    </a>
                                                    
                                                    @if (delivery.Status != "Delivered" && delivery.Status != "Cancelled")
                                                    {
                                                        <div class="dropdown">
                                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary dropdown-toggle" 
                                                                    type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown">
                                                                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                                            </button>
                                                            <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                                                                @if (delivery.Status == "Pending")
                                                                {
                                                                    <li>
                                                                        <form method="post" action="@Url.Action("UpdateDeliveryStatus")" class="d-inline">
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="deliveryId" value="@delivery.Id" />
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="status" value="In Transit" />
                                                                            <button type="submit" class="dropdown-item">
                                                                                <i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Start Delivery
                                                                            </button>
                                                                        </form>
                                                                    </li>
                                                                }
                                                                @if (delivery.Status == "In Transit")
                                                                {
                                                                    <li>
                                                                        <a href="@Url.Action("ScanQRCode", "Delivery")" class="dropdown-item">
                                                                            <i class="fas fa-qrcode"></i> Scan QR Code
                                                                        </a>
                                                                    </li>
                                                                    <li>
                                                                        <form method="post" action="@Url.Action("UpdateDeliveryStatus")" class="d-inline">
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="deliveryId" value="@delivery.Id" />
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="status" value="Delivered" />
                                                                            <button type="submit" class="dropdown-item">
                                                                                <i class="fas fa-check"></i> Mark as Delivered
                                                                            </button>
                                                                        </form>
                                                                    </li>
                                                                }
                                                            </ul>
                                                        </div>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </td>
                                        </tr>
                                    }
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center py-5">
                            <i class="fas fa-truck fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                            <h5 class="text-muted">No deliveries assigned</h5>
                            <p class="text-muted">You don't have any deliveries assigned to you at the moment.</p>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Service Pickups Section -->
    <div class="row mt-4">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-hand-paper"></i> My Assigned Pickups
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @{
                        var assignedPickups = ViewBag.AssignedPickups as IEnumerable<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.VehiclePickup> ?? new List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.VehiclePickup>();
                    }
                    @if (assignedPickups.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="table-responsive">
                            <table class="table table-striped table-hover">
                                <thead class="table-dark">
                                    <tr>
                                        <th>Pickup ID</th>
                                        <th>Customer</th>
                                        <th>Vehicle</th>
                                        <th>Pickup Date & Time</th>
                                        <th>Pickup Location</th>
                                        <th>Status</th>
                                        <th>Actions</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    @foreach (var pickup in assignedPickups)
                                    {
                                        <tr>
                                            <td>
                                                <strong>#@pickup.VehiclePickupId</strong>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (pickup.ServiceBooking?.Customer != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@pickup.ServiceBooking.Customer.FirstName @pickup.ServiceBooking.Customer.LastName</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@pickup.ServiceBooking.Customer.Email</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@pickup.ServiceBooking?.CustomerName</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@pickup.ServiceBooking?.CustomerEmail</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (pickup.ServiceBooking != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@pickup.ServiceBooking.Make @pickup.ServiceBooking.Model</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">Year: @pickup.ServiceBooking.Year</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">N/A</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                <div>
                                                    <strong>@pickup.PickupDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</strong><br>
                                                    <small class="text-muted">@pickup.PickupTime.ToString(@"hh\:mm")</small>
                                                </div>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(pickup.PickupLocation))
                                                {
                                                    <small>@pickup.PickupLocation</small>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">Location not provided</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @switch (pickup.PickupStatus)
                                                {
                                                    case "Scheduled":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-info">Scheduled</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Assigned":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-primary">Assigned</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "EnRoute":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-warning">En Route</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Collected":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Collected</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Delivered":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Delivered</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Completed":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Completed</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    default:
                                                        <span class="badge bg-secondary">@pickup.PickupStatus</span>
                                                        break;
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                <a href="@Url.Action("Details", "PickupDropoff", new { id = pickup.VehiclePickupId })" 
                                                   class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" title="View Details">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                                </a>
                                            </td>
                                        </tr>
                                    }
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center py-5">
                            <i class="fas fa-hand-paper fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                            <h5 class="text-muted">No pickups assigned</h5>
                            <p class="text-muted">You don't have any pickup assignments at the moment.</p>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        // Auto-refresh the page every 5 minutes to get updated delivery status
        setTimeout(function() {
            location.reload();
        }, 300000); // 5 minutes
    </script>
}
```

Build succeeded. Starting the application:


## Summary

### Problem
The Driver Dashboard only queried `Deliveries` (vehicle delivery), while the pickup system writes to `VehiclePickups`. This is why assigned pickups didn’t appear.

### Solution
Updated the dashboard to show both pickups and deliveries.

**Changes in `Controllers/DriverController.cs`:**
1. Load the `Driver` entity for the logged-in user.
2. Query `VehiclePickups` where `DriverId` matches the driver.
3. Include `ServiceBooking.Customer` for related data.
4. Combine counts in the stats (total, completed, pending, today).

**Changes in `Views/Driver/Dashboard.cshtml`:**
1. Added a “My Assigned Pickups” section.
2. Displays pickup ID, customer, vehicle, date/time, location, and status.
3. Renders empty state when none exist.

### Result
On the Driver Dashboard (`https://localhost:7213`), you’ll see:
- "My Assigned Deliveries" for purchased vehicle deliveries.
- "My Assigned Pickups" for service pickups.

Stats reflect totals across both. A booked service with pickup will appear under "My Assigned Pickups" for the assigned driver.

**Warnings:**
- `CustomerFeedback.ContractId1` — shadow property
- `ServiceChecklist.ServiceJobId1` — shadow property
- `Warranty.ContractId1` — shadow property

These are about EF Core creating shadow properties for foreign keys and won’t affect functionality.

If you see specific errors (e.g., driver dashboard not loading, pickups not appearing, exceptions), share the details and I’ll fix them.

**Cursor**

The Driver Dashboard only has a "View Details" button. Checking the PickupDropoff controller for existing actions:


Adding actionable buttons to the Driver Dashboard for managing pickups:


Add these workflow actions to the driver dashboard. Copy and apply these changes:

## Recommended Actions for Pickup Workflow

**Replace the Actions column in `Views/Driver/Dashboard.cshtml` (around line 354) with this:**

```html
<td>
    <div class="btn-group" role="group">
        <a href="@Url.Action("Details", "PickupDropoff", new { id = pickup.VehiclePickupId })" 
           class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" title="View Details">
            <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
        </a>
        
        @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "Assigned" || pickup.PickupStatus == "Scheduled")
        {
            <button onclick="updatePickupStatus(@pickup.VehiclePickupId, 'EnRoute')" 
                    class="btn btn-sm btn-success" title="Start Pickup">
                <i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i> Start
            </button>
        }
        
        @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "EnRoute")
        {
            <button onclick="updatePickupStatus(@pickup.VehiclePickupId, 'Collected')" 
                    class="btn btn-sm btn-warning" title="Mark Collected">
                <i class="fas fa-check"></i> Collected
            </button>
        }
        
        @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "Collected" || pickup.PickupStatus == "InService")
        {
            <button onclick="uploadConditionPhotos(@pickup.VehiclePickupId)" 
                    class="btn btn-sm btn-info" title="Upload Vehicle Photos">
                <i class="fas fa-camera"></i> Photos
            </button>
        }
        
        <button onclick="callCustomer('@pickup.ServiceBooking?.CustomerPhone')" 
                class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" title="Call Customer">
            <i class="fas fa-phone"></i>
        </button>
    </div>
</td>
```

**Add this JavaScript at the bottom of `Views/Driver/Dashboard.cshtml` (before `@section Scripts`):**

```html
<script>
    // Auto-refresh the page every 5 minutes to get updated pickup status
    setTimeout(function() {
        location.reload();
    }, 300000); // 5 minutes

    // Update pickup status via AJAX
    async function updatePickupStatus(pickupId, status) {
        if (!confirm(`Are you sure you want to update status to "${status}"?`)) {
            return;
        }

        try {
            const response = await fetch(`@Url.Action("UpdateStatus", "PickupDropoff")/${pickupId}`, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
                },
                body: `status=${status}`
            });

            const data = await response.json();
            
            if (data.success) {
                alert(data.message);
                location.reload();
            } else {
                alert('Error: ' + data.message);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error updating status:', error);
            alert('Failed to update status. Please try again.');
        }
    }

    // Upload vehicle condition photos
    function uploadConditionPhotos(pickupId) {
        window.location.href = `@Url.Action("UploadPhotos", "PickupDropoff")/${pickupId}`;
    }

    // Call customer
    function callCustomer(phoneNumber) {
        if (phoneNumber) {
            window.location.href = `tel:${phoneNumber}`;
        } else {
            alert('Customer phone number not available');
        }
    }
</script>
```

**Add controller actions in `Controllers/PickupDropoffController.cs`:**

```csharp
// Add this action for driver workflow page
[HttpGet]
[Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
public async Task<IActionResult> Manage(int id)
{
    var userId = User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value;
    var driver = await _db.Drivers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.UserId == userId);
    
    if (driver == null)
    {
        return NotFound("Driver profile not found");
    }

    var pickup = await _db.VehiclePickups
        .Include(p => p.ServiceBooking)
            .ThenInclude(sb => sb.Customer)
        .Include(p => p.Driver)
        .FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.VehiclePickupId == id && p.DriverId == driver.Id);

    if (pickup == null)
    {
        return NotFound();
    }

    return View(pickup);
}

// Add photo upload view
[HttpGet]
[Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
public async Task<IActionResult> UploadPhotos(int id)
{
    var userId = User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value;
    var driver = await _db.Drivers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.UserId == userId);
    
    var pickup = await _db.VehiclePickups
        .Include(p => p.ServiceBooking)
        .FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.VehiclePickupId == id && p.DriverId == driver.Id);

    if (pickup == null)
    {
        return NotFound();
    }

    return View(pickup);
}

[HttpPost]
[Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
[ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
public async Task<IActionResult> UploadPhotos(int id, List<IFormFile> photos)
{
    var userId = User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value;
    var driver = await _db.Drivers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.UserId == userId);
    
    var pickup = await _db.VehiclePickups
        .FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.VehiclePickupId == id && p.DriverId == driver.Id);

    if (pickup == null)
    {
        return NotFound();
    }

    if (photos == null || !photos.Any())
    {
        ModelState.AddModelError("", "Please select at least one photo");
        return View(pickup);
    }

    var photoUrls = new List<string>();
    var uploadsPath = Path.Combine("wwwroot", "uploads", "pickup-photos");

    if (!Directory.Exists(uploadsPath))
    {
        Directory.CreateDirectory(uploadsPath);
    }

    foreach (var photo in photos)
    {
        if (photo.Length > 0)
        {
            var fileName = $"{pickup.VehiclePickupId}_{Guid.NewGuid()}{Path.GetExtension(photo.FileName)}";
            var filePath = Path.Combine(uploadsPath, fileName);

            using (var stream = new FileStream(filePath, FileMode.Create))
            {
                await photo.CopyToAsync(stream);
            }

            photoUrls.Add($"/uploads/pickup-photos/{fileName}");
        }
    }

    // Update pickup with photo URLs
    var existingPhotos = string.IsNullOrEmpty(pickup.PickupPhotos) 
        ? new List<string>() 
        : System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<string>>(pickup.PickupPhotos) ?? new List<string>();

    existingPhotos.AddRange(photoUrls);
    pickup.PickupPhotos = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(existingPhotos);
    pickup.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

    await _db.SaveChangesAsync();

    TempData["SuccessMessage"] = $"Successfully uploaded {photoUrls.Count} photos";
    return RedirectToAction("Manage", new { id });
}
```

## Complete Workflow Suggestion

Drivers can:
1. Start pickup → set status to "EnRoute"
2. Mark collected → set status to "Collected"
3. Upload photos → capture vehicle condition
4. Call customer → use phone number
5. Complete pickup → status transition to "Completed"

I can also add:
- Digital signature capture for vehicle receipt
- GPS location tracking on pickup
- Customer SMS notifications at each step
- Photo gallery for before/after service

Should I implement these changes?

```html
    <div class="btn-group" role="group">

           class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" title="View Details">
            <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
        </a>
        
        @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "Assigned" || pickup.PickupStatus == "Scheduled")
        {
            <button onclick="updatePickupStatus(@pickup.VehiclePickupId, 'EnRoute')" 
                    class="btn btn-sm btn-success" title="Start Pickup">
                <i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i> Start
            </button>
        }
        
        @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "EnRoute")

                    class="btn btn-sm btn-warning" title="Mark Collected">

        <button onclick="callCustomer('@pickup.ServiceBooking?.CustomerPhone')" 
                class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" title="Call Customer">
            <i class="fas fa-phone"></i>
        </button>
    </div>
</td>
```

```csharp
// Add this action for driver workflow page
[HttpGet]
[Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
public async Task<IActionResult> Manage(int id)
{
    var userId = User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value;
    var driver = await _db.Drivers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.UserId == userId);
    
    if (driver == null)
    {
        return NotFound("Driver profile not found");
    }

    var pickup = await _db.VehiclePickups
        .Include(p => p.ServiceBooking)
            .ThenInclude(sb => sb.Customer)
        .Include(p => p.Driver)
        .FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.VehiclePickupId == id && p.DriverId == driver.Id);

    if (pickup == null)
    {
        return NotFound();
    }

    return View(pickup);
}

// Add photo upload view
[HttpGet]
[Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
public async Task<IActionResult> UploadPhotos(int id)
{
    var userId = User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value;
    var driver = await _db.Drivers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.UserId == userId);

        .Include(p => p.ServiceBooking)
        .FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.VehiclePickupId == id && p.DriverId == driver.Id);

    if (pickup == null)

}

[HttpPost]
[Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
[ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
public async Task<IActionResult> UploadPhotos(int id, List<IFormFile> photos)
{
    var userId = User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value;
    var driver = await _db.Drivers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.UserId == userId);
    
    var pickup = await _db.VehiclePickups
        .FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.VehiclePickupId == id && p.DriverId == driver.Id);

    if (pickup == null)
    {
        return NotFound();
    }

    if (photos == null || !photos.Any())
    {
        ModelState.AddModelError("", "Please select at least one photo");
        return View(pickup);
    }

    var photoUrls = new List<string>();
    var uploadsPath = Path.Combine("wwwroot", "uploads", "pickup-photos");

    if (!Directory.Exists(uploadsPath))
    {
        Directory.CreateDirectory(uploadsPath);
    }

    foreach (var photo in photos)
    {
        if (photo.Length > 0)
        {
            var fileName = $"{pickup.VehiclePickupId}_{Guid.NewGuid()}{Path.GetExtension(photo.FileName)}";
            var filePath = Path.Combine(uploadsPath, fileName);

            using (var stream = new FileStream(filePath, FileMode.Create))
            {
                await photo.CopyToAsync(stream);
            }

            photoUrls.Add($"/uploads/pickup-photos/{fileName}");
        }
    }

    // Update pickup with photo URLs
    var existingPhotos = string.IsNullOrEmpty(pickup.PickupPhotos) 
        ? new List<string>() 
        : System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<string>>(pickup.PickupPhotos) ?? new List<string>();

    existingPhotos.AddRange(photoUrls);
    pickup.PickupPhotos = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(existingPhotos);
    pickup.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

    await _db.SaveChangesAsync();

    TempData["SuccessMessage"] = $"Successfully uploaded {photoUrls.Count} photos";
    return RedirectToAction("Manage", new { id });
}
```
