```aspnetcorerazor
@model IEnumerable<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Delivery>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Driver Dashboard";
    Layout = "~/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml";
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h2><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Driver Dashboard</h2>
                <div class="text-muted">
                    Welcome, <strong>@ViewBag.DriverName</strong>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Statistics Cards -->
    <div class="row mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-primary text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.TotalDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Total Deliveries</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-boxes fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-success text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.CompletedDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Completed</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-warning text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.PendingDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Pending</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-clock fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-info text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.TodayDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Today's Deliveries</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-calendar-day fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Deliveries Table -->
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-list"></i> My Assigned Deliveries
                    </h5>
                    <a href="@Url.Action("ScanQRCode", "Delivery")" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-qrcode me-1"></i> Scan QR Code
                    </a>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @if (Model.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="table-responsive">
                            <table class="table table-striped table-hover">
                                <thead class="table-dark">
                                    <tr>
                                        <th>Delivery ID</th>
                                        <th>Customer</th>
                                        <th>Vehicle</th>
                                        <th>Scheduled Date</th>
                                        <th>Delivery Address</th>
                                        <th>Status</th>
                                        <th>Actions</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    @foreach (var delivery in Model)
                                    {
                                        <tr>
                                            <td>
                                                <strong>#@delivery.Id</strong>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (delivery.Contract?.Customer != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@delivery.Contract.Customer.User.FirstName @delivery.Contract.Customer.User.LastName</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@delivery.Contract.Customer.User.Email</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">N/A</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (delivery.Contract?.Vehicle != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@delivery.Contract.Vehicle.Year @delivery.Contract.Vehicle.Make @delivery.Contract.Vehicle.Model</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">Color: @delivery.Contract.Vehicle.ExteriorColor</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">N/A</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                <div>
                                    <strong>@delivery.ScheduledDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</strong><br>
                                    <small class="text-muted">@delivery.ScheduledDate.ToString("hh:mm tt")</small>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(delivery.DeliveryAddress))
                                                {
                                                    <small>@delivery.DeliveryAddress</small>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">Address not provided</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @switch (delivery.Status)
                                                {
                                                    case "Pending":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-warning">Pending</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "In Transit":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-info">In Transit</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Delivered":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Delivered</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Cancelled":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-danger">Cancelled</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    default:
                                                        <span class="badge bg-secondary">@delivery.Status</span>
                                                        break;
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("DeliveryDetails", new { id = delivery.Id })" 
                                                       class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" title="View Details">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                                    </a>
                                                    
                                                    @if (delivery.Status != "Delivered" && delivery.Status != "Cancelled")
                                                    {
                                                        <div class="dropdown">
                                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary dropdown-toggle" 
                                                                    type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown">
                                                                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                                            </button>
                                                            <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                                                                @if (delivery.Status == "Pending")
                                                                {
                                                                    <li>
                                                                        <form method="post" action="@Url.Action("UpdateDeliveryStatus")" class="d-inline">
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="deliveryId" value="@delivery.Id" />
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="status" value="In Transit" />
                                                                            <button type="submit" class="dropdown-item">
                                                                                <i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Start Delivery
                                                                            </button>
                                                                        </form>
                                                                    </li>
                                                                }
                                                                @if (delivery.Status == "In Transit")
                                                                {
                                                                    <li>
                                                                        <a href="@Url.Action("ScanQRCode", "Delivery")" class="dropdown-item">
                                                                            <i class="fas fa-qrcode"></i> Scan QR Code
                                                                        </a>
                                                                    </li>
                                                                    <li>
                                                                        <form method="post" action="@Url.Action("UpdateDeliveryStatus")" class="d-inline">
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="deliveryId" value="@delivery.Id" />
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="status" value="Delivered" />
                                                                            <button type="submit" class="dropdown-item">
                                                                                <i class="fas fa-check"></i> Mark as Delivered
                                                                            </button>
                                                                        </form>
                                                                    </li>
                                                                }
                                                            </ul>
                                                        </div>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </td>
                                        </tr>
                                    }
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center py-5">
                            <i class="fas fa-truck fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                            <h5 class="text-muted">No deliveries assigned</h5>
                            <p class="text-muted">You don't have any deliveries assigned to you at the moment.</p>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Service Pickups Section -->
    <div class="row mt-4">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-hand-paper"></i> My Assigned Pickups
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @{
                        var assignedPickups = ViewBag.AssignedPickups as IEnumerable<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.VehiclePickup> ?? new List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.VehiclePickup>();
                    }
                    @if (assignedPickups.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="table-responsive">
                            <table class="table table-striped table-hover">
                                <thead class="table-dark">
                                    <tr>
                                        <th>Pickup ID</th>
                                        <th>Customer</th>
                                        <th>Vehicle</th>
                                        <th>Pickup Date & Time</th>
                                        <th>Pickup Location</th>
                                        <th>Status</th>
                                        <th>Actions</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    @foreach (var pickup in assignedPickups)
                                    {
                                        <tr>
                                            <td>
                                                <strong>#@pickup.VehiclePickupId</strong>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (pickup.ServiceBooking?.Customer != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@pickup.ServiceBooking.Customer.FirstName @pickup.ServiceBooking.Customer.LastName</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@pickup.ServiceBooking.Customer.Email</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@pickup.ServiceBooking?.CustomerName</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@pickup.ServiceBooking?.CustomerEmail</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (pickup.ServiceBooking != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@pickup.ServiceBooking.Make @pickup.ServiceBooking.Model</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">Year: @pickup.ServiceBooking.Year</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">N/A</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                <div>
                                                    <strong>@pickup.PickupDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</strong><br>
                                                    <small class="text-muted">@pickup.PickupTime.ToString(@"hh\:mm")</small>
                                                </div>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(pickup.PickupLocation))
                                                {
                                                    <small>@pickup.PickupLocation</small>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">Location not provided</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @switch (pickup.PickupStatus)
                                                {
                                                    case "Scheduled":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-info">Scheduled</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Assigned":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-primary">Assigned</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "EnRoute":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-warning">En Route</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Collected":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Collected</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Delivered":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Delivered</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Completed":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Completed</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    default:
                                                        <span class="badge bg-secondary">@pickup.PickupStatus</span>
                                                        break;
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("Details", "PickupDropoff", new { id = pickup.VehiclePickupId })" 
                                                       class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" title="View Details">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                                    </a>
                                                    
                                                    @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "Assigned" || pickup.PickupStatus == "Scheduled")
                                                    {
                                                        <button onclick="updatePickupStatus(@pickup.VehiclePickupId, 'EnRoute')" 
                                                                class="btn btn-sm btn-success" title="Start Pickup">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-play"></i>
                                                        </button>
                                                    }
                                                    
                                                    @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "EnRoute")
                                                    {
                                                        <button onclick="updatePickupStatus(@pickup.VehiclePickupId, 'Collected')" 
                                                                class="btn btn-sm btn-warning text-dark" title="Mark Collected">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                                                        </button>
                                                    }
                                                    
                                                    @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "Collected" || pickup.PickupStatus == "InService")
                                                    {
                                                        <button onclick="uploadPickupPhotos(@pickup.VehiclePickupId)" 
                                                                class="btn btn-sm btn-info" title="Upload Vehicle Photos">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-camera"></i>
                                                        </button>
                                                    }
                                                    
                                                    @if (pickup.ServiceBooking != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(pickup.ServiceBooking.CustomerPhone))
                                                    {
                                                        <a href="tel:@pickup.ServiceBooking.CustomerPhone" 
                                                           class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" title="Call Customer">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-phone"></i>
                                                        </a>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </td>
                                        </tr>
                                    }
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center py-5">
                            <i class="fas fa-hand-paper fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                            <h5 class="text-muted">No pickups assigned</h5>
                            <p class="text-muted">You don't have any pickup assignments at the moment.</p>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        // Auto-refresh the page every 5 minutes to get updated delivery status
        setTimeout(function() {
            location.reload();
        }, 300000); // 5 minutes

        // Update pickup status via AJAX
        async function updatePickupStatus(pickupId, status) {
            const statusMessages = {
                'EnRoute': 'Are you starting the pickup journey?',
                'Collected': 'Have you collected the vehicle from the customer?',
                'Completed': 'Are you marking this pickup as completed?'
            };

            const message = statusMessages[status] || `Are you sure you want to update status to "${status}"?`;
            if (!confirm(message)) {
                return;
            }

            try {
                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('id', pickupId);
                formData.append('status', status);
                
                const response = await fetch(`@Url.Action("UpdateStatus", "PickupDropoff")`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    body: formData
                });

                const data = await response.json();
                
                if (data.success) {
                    alert('Status updated successfully!');
                    location.reload();
                } else {
                    alert('Error: ' + data.message);
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error updating status:', error);
                alert('Failed to update status. Please try again.');
            }
        }

        // Redirect to photo upload page
        function uploadPickupPhotos(pickupId) {
            window.location.href = `@Url.Action("PhotoUpload", "PickupDropoff")/${pickupId}`;
        }
    </script>
}
```

```csharp
using AutoEdge.Data;
using AutoEdge.Models.Entities;
using AutoEdge.Services;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;

namespace AutoEdge.Controllers
{
    [Authorize]
    public class PickupDropoffController : Controller
    {
        private readonly IPickupDropoffService _pickupService;
        private readonly ApplicationDbContext _db;
        private readonly ILogger<PickupDropoffController> _logger;

        public PickupDropoffController(IPickupDropoffService pickupService, ApplicationDbContext db, ILogger<PickupDropoffController> logger)
        {
            _pickupService = pickupService;
            _db = db;
            _logger = logger;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        [Authorize(Roles = "ServiceManager,Administrator")]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Index(string? status = null, string? date = null)
        {
            var query = _db.VehiclePickups
                .Include(p => p.ServiceBooking)
                .Include(p => p.Driver)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(status))
            {
                query = query.Where(p => p.PickupStatus == status);
            }

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(date) && DateTime.TryParse(date, out var filterDate))
            {
                query = query.Where(p => p.PickupDate.Date == filterDate.Date);
            }

            var pickups = await query
                .OrderByDescending(p => p.PickupDate)
                .ToListAsync();

            ViewBag.StatusFilter = status;
            ViewBag.DateFilter = date;
            ViewBag.StatusOptions = new[] { "Scheduled", "EnRoute", "Collected", "InService", "Completed", "Delivered", "Failed" };

            return View(pickups);
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Create(int? bookingId = null)
        {
            if (bookingId.HasValue)
            {
                var booking = await _db.ServiceBookings
                    .FirstOrDefaultAsync(b => b.Id == bookingId.Value);
                
                if (booking == null)
                {
                    return NotFound();
                }

                ViewBag.Booking = booking;
            }

            return View();
        }

        [HttpPost]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Create(CreatePickupRequest request)
        {
            if (!ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                return View(request);
            }

            try
            {
                // Validate serviceable zone
                var isServiceable = await _pickupService.CheckServiceableZoneAsync(request.PickupLocation);
                if (!isServiceable)
                {
                    ModelState.AddModelError("PickupLocation", "This address is outside our serviceable area. Please contact us for alternative arrangements.");
                    return View(request);
                }

                // Check driver availability
                var availableDrivers = await _pickupService.GetAvailableDriversAsync(request.PickupDate, request.PickupTime);
                if (!availableDrivers.Any())
                {
                    ModelState.AddModelError("PickupDate", "No drivers are available at the requested time. Please select a different time slot.");
                    return View(request);
                }

                var pickup = await _pickupService.CreatePickupRequestAsync(request);
                
                TempData["SuccessMessage"] = "Pickup request created successfully! A driver will be assigned shortly.";
                return RedirectToAction("Details", new { id = pickup.VehiclePickupId });
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                _logger.LogError(ex, "Error creating pickup request");
                ModelState.AddModelError("", "An error occurred while creating the pickup request. Please try again.");
                return View(request);
            }
        }

        [HttpGet]
        [Authorize(Roles = "ServiceManager,Administrator")]
        public async Task<IActionResult> AssignDriver(int id)
        {
            var pickup = await _db.VehiclePickups
                .Include(p => p.ServiceBooking)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.VehiclePickupId == id);

            if (pickup == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var availableDrivers = await _pickupService.GetAvailableDriversAsync(pickup.PickupDate, pickup.PickupTime);
            
            ViewBag.AvailableDrivers = availableDrivers;
            return View(pickup);
        }

        [HttpPost]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        [Authorize(Roles = "ServiceManager,Administrator")]
        public async Task<IActionResult> AssignDriver(int id, string driverId)
        {
            try
            {
                var success = await _pickupService.AssignDriverAsync(id, driverId);
                
                if (success)
                {
                    TempData["SuccessMessage"] = "Driver assigned successfully!";
                    return RedirectToAction("Index");
                }
                else
                {
                    TempData["ErrorMessage"] = "Failed to assign driver. Please try again.";
                    return RedirectToAction("AssignDriver", new { id });
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                _logger.LogError(ex, "Error assigning driver to pickup {PickupId}", id);
                TempData["ErrorMessage"] = "An error occurred while assigning the driver.";
                return RedirectToAction("AssignDriver", new { id });
            }
        }

        [HttpPost]
        [Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
        public async Task<IActionResult> UpdateStatus(int id, string status, string? notes = null)
        {
            try
            {
                var success = await _pickupService.UpdatePickupStatusAsync(id, status, notes);
                
                if (success)
                {
                    return Json(new { success = true, message = "Status updated successfully" });
                }
                else
                {
                    return Json(new { success = false, message = "Failed to update status" });
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                _logger.LogError(ex, "Error updating pickup status for {PickupId}", id);
                return Json(new { success = false, message = "An error occurred while updating status" });
            }
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Details(int id)
        {
            var pickup = await _db.VehiclePickups
                .Include(p => p.ServiceBooking)
                .Include(p => p.Driver)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.VehiclePickupId == id);

            if (pickup == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            return View(pickup);
        }

        [HttpGet]
        [Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
        public async Task<IActionResult> DriverApp()
        {
            var userId = User.Identity?.Name;
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(userId))
            {
                return Unauthorized();
            }

            var driver = await _db.Drivers
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.UserId == userId);

            if (driver == null)
            {
                return NotFound("Driver profile not found");
            }

            var assignedPickups = await _db.VehiclePickups
                .Include(p => p.ServiceBooking)
                .Where(p => p.DriverId == driver.Id && 
                           (p.PickupStatus == "Scheduled" || p.PickupStatus == "EnRoute" || p.PickupStatus == "Collected" || p.PickupStatus == "InService"))
                .OrderBy(p => p.PickupDate)
                .ToListAsync();

            return View(assignedPickups);
        }

        [HttpGet]
        [Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
        public async Task<IActionResult> PhotoUpload(int id)
        {
            var userId = User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value;
            var driver = await _db.Drivers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.UserId == userId);

            if (driver == null)
            {
                return NotFound("Driver profile not found");
            }

            var pickup = await _db.VehiclePickups
                .Include(p => p.ServiceBooking)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.VehiclePickupId == id && p.DriverId == driver.Id);

            if (pickup == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            return View(pickup);
        }

        [HttpPost]
        [Authorize(Roles = "Driver")]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> UploadPhotos(int id, List<IFormFile> photos, string photoType)
        {
            var userId = User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value;
            var driver = await _db.Drivers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(d => d.UserId == userId);

            if (driver == null)
            {
                return NotFound("Driver profile not found");
            }

            var pickup = await _db.VehiclePickups
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(p => p.VehiclePickupId == id && p.DriverId == driver.Id);

            if (pickup == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            if (photos == null || !photos.Any())
            {
                ModelState.AddModelError("", "Please select at least one photo");
                return View("PhotoUpload", pickup);
            }

            var photoUrls = new List<string>();
            var uploadsPath = Path.Combine("wwwroot", "uploads", "pickup-photos");

            if (!Directory.Exists(uploadsPath))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(uploadsPath);
            }

            foreach (var photo in photos)
            {
                if (photo.Length > 0)
                {
                    var fileName = $"{pickup.VehiclePickupId}_{Guid.NewGuid()}{Path.GetExtension(photo.FileName)}";
                    var filePath = Path.Combine(uploadsPath, fileName);

                    using (var stream = new FileStream(filePath, FileMode.Create))
                    {
                        await photo.CopyToAsync(stream);
                    }

                    photoUrls.Add($"/uploads/pickup-photos/{fileName}");
                }
            }

            // Update pickup with photo URLs
            var existingPhotos = string.IsNullOrEmpty(pickup.PickupPhotos) 
                ? new List<string>() 
                : System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<string>>(pickup.PickupPhotos) ?? new List<string>();

            existingPhotos.AddRange(photoUrls);
            pickup.PickupPhotos = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(existingPhotos);
            pickup.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();

            TempData["SuccessMessage"] = $"Successfully uploaded {photoUrls.Count} photos";
            return RedirectToAction("PhotoUpload", new { id });
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<IActionResult> CustomerPickups()
        {
            var userId = User.Identity?.Name;
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(userId))
            {
                return Unauthorized();
            }

            var pickups = await _pickupService.GetCustomerPickupsAsync(userId);
            return View(pickups);
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<IActionResult> ScheduleReturn(int pickupId, DateTime returnDate, TimeSpan returnTime)
        {
            try
            {
                var success = await _pickupService.ScheduleReturnAsync(pickupId, returnDate, returnTime);
                
                if (success)
                {
                    return Json(new { success = true, message = "Return delivery scheduled successfully" });
                }
                else
                {
                    return Json(new { success = false, message = "Failed to schedule return delivery" });
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                _logger.LogError(ex, "Error scheduling return for pickup {PickupId}", pickupId);
                return Json(new { success = false, message = "An error occurred while scheduling return" });
            }
        }
    }
}

```

Rebuilding the application:


Fixing the JavaScript fetch call to send URL-encoded data:


```aspnetcorerazor
@model IEnumerable<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.Delivery>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Driver Dashboard";
    Layout = "~/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml";
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h2><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Driver Dashboard</h2>
                <div class="text-muted">
                    Welcome, <strong>@ViewBag.DriverName</strong>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Statistics Cards -->
    <div class="row mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-primary text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.TotalDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Total Deliveries</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-boxes fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-success text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.CompletedDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Completed</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-warning text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.PendingDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Pending</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-clock fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card bg-info text-white">
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="card-title">@ViewBag.TodayDeliveries</h4>
                            <p class="card-text">Today's Deliveries</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="align-self-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-calendar-day fa-2x"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Deliveries Table -->
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-list"></i> My Assigned Deliveries
                    </h5>
                    <a href="@Url.Action("ScanQRCode", "Delivery")" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-qrcode me-1"></i> Scan QR Code
                    </a>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @if (Model.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="table-responsive">
                            <table class="table table-striped table-hover">
                                <thead class="table-dark">
                                    <tr>
                                        <th>Delivery ID</th>
                                        <th>Customer</th>
                                        <th>Vehicle</th>
                                        <th>Scheduled Date</th>
                                        <th>Delivery Address</th>
                                        <th>Status</th>
                                        <th>Actions</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    @foreach (var delivery in Model)
                                    {
                                        <tr>
                                            <td>
                                                <strong>#@delivery.Id</strong>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (delivery.Contract?.Customer != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@delivery.Contract.Customer.User.FirstName @delivery.Contract.Customer.User.LastName</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@delivery.Contract.Customer.User.Email</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">N/A</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (delivery.Contract?.Vehicle != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@delivery.Contract.Vehicle.Year @delivery.Contract.Vehicle.Make @delivery.Contract.Vehicle.Model</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">Color: @delivery.Contract.Vehicle.ExteriorColor</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">N/A</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                <div>
                                    <strong>@delivery.ScheduledDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</strong><br>
                                    <small class="text-muted">@delivery.ScheduledDate.ToString("hh:mm tt")</small>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(delivery.DeliveryAddress))
                                                {
                                                    <small>@delivery.DeliveryAddress</small>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">Address not provided</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @switch (delivery.Status)
                                                {
                                                    case "Pending":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-warning">Pending</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "In Transit":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-info">In Transit</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Delivered":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Delivered</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Cancelled":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-danger">Cancelled</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    default:
                                                        <span class="badge bg-secondary">@delivery.Status</span>
                                                        break;
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("DeliveryDetails", new { id = delivery.Id })" 
                                                       class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" title="View Details">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                                    </a>
                                                    
                                                    @if (delivery.Status != "Delivered" && delivery.Status != "Cancelled")
                                                    {
                                                        <div class="dropdown">
                                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary dropdown-toggle" 
                                                                    type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown">
                                                                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                                            </button>
                                                            <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                                                                @if (delivery.Status == "Pending")
                                                                {
                                                                    <li>
                                                                        <form method="post" action="@Url.Action("UpdateDeliveryStatus")" class="d-inline">
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="deliveryId" value="@delivery.Id" />
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="status" value="In Transit" />
                                                                            <button type="submit" class="dropdown-item">
                                                                                <i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Start Delivery
                                                                            </button>
                                                                        </form>
                                                                    </li>
                                                                }
                                                                @if (delivery.Status == "In Transit")
                                                                {
                                                                    <li>
                                                                        <a href="@Url.Action("ScanQRCode", "Delivery")" class="dropdown-item">
                                                                            <i class="fas fa-qrcode"></i> Scan QR Code
                                                                        </a>
                                                                    </li>
                                                                    <li>
                                                                        <form method="post" action="@Url.Action("UpdateDeliveryStatus")" class="d-inline">
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="deliveryId" value="@delivery.Id" />
                                                                            <input type="hidden" name="status" value="Delivered" />
                                                                            <button type="submit" class="dropdown-item">
                                                                                <i class="fas fa-check"></i> Mark as Delivered
                                                                            </button>
                                                                        </form>
                                                                    </li>
                                                                }
                                                            </ul>
                                                        </div>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </td>
                                        </tr>
                                    }
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center py-5">
                            <i class="fas fa-truck fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                            <h5 class="text-muted">No deliveries assigned</h5>
                            <p class="text-muted">You don't have any deliveries assigned to you at the moment.</p>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Service Pickups Section -->
    <div class="row mt-4">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-hand-paper"></i> My Assigned Pickups
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @{
                        var assignedPickups = ViewBag.AssignedPickups as IEnumerable<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.VehiclePickup> ?? new List<AutoEdge.Models.Entities.VehiclePickup>();
                    }
                    @if (assignedPickups.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="table-responsive">
                            <table class="table table-striped table-hover">
                                <thead class="table-dark">
                                    <tr>
                                        <th>Pickup ID</th>
                                        <th>Customer</th>
                                        <th>Vehicle</th>
                                        <th>Pickup Date & Time</th>
                                        <th>Pickup Location</th>
                                        <th>Status</th>
                                        <th>Actions</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    @foreach (var pickup in assignedPickups)
                                    {
                                        <tr>
                                            <td>
                                                <strong>#@pickup.VehiclePickupId</strong>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (pickup.ServiceBooking?.Customer != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@pickup.ServiceBooking.Customer.FirstName @pickup.ServiceBooking.Customer.LastName</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@pickup.ServiceBooking.Customer.Email</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@pickup.ServiceBooking?.CustomerName</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@pickup.ServiceBooking?.CustomerEmail</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (pickup.ServiceBooking != null)
                                                {
                                                    <div>
                                                        <strong>@pickup.ServiceBooking.Make @pickup.ServiceBooking.Model</strong><br>
                                                        <small class="text-muted">Year: @pickup.ServiceBooking.Year</small>
                                                    </div>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">N/A</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                <div>
                                                    <strong>@pickup.PickupDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</strong><br>
                                                    <small class="text-muted">@pickup.PickupTime.ToString(@"hh\:mm")</small>
                                                </div>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(pickup.PickupLocation))
                                                {
                                                    <small>@pickup.PickupLocation</small>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <span class="text-muted">Location not provided</span>
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                @switch (pickup.PickupStatus)
                                                {
                                                    case "Scheduled":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-info">Scheduled</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Assigned":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-primary">Assigned</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "EnRoute":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-warning">En Route</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Collected":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Collected</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Delivered":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Delivered</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    case "Completed":
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Completed</span>
                                                        break;
                                                    default:
                                                        <span class="badge bg-secondary">@pickup.PickupStatus</span>
                                                        break;
                                                }
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                                    <a href="@Url.Action("Details", "PickupDropoff", new { id = pickup.VehiclePickupId })" 
                                                       class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" title="View Details">
                                                        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                                    </a>
                                                    
                                                    @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "Assigned" || pickup.PickupStatus == "Scheduled")
                                                    {
                                                        <button onclick="updatePickupStatus(@pickup.VehiclePickupId, 'EnRoute')" 
                                                                class="btn btn-sm btn-success" title="Start Pickup">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-play"></i>
                                                        </button>
                                                    }
                                                    
                                                    @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "EnRoute")
                                                    {
                                                        <button onclick="updatePickupStatus(@pickup.VehiclePickupId, 'Collected')" 
                                                                class="btn btn-sm btn-warning text-dark" title="Mark Collected">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                                                        </button>
                                                    }
                                                    
                                                    @if (pickup.PickupStatus == "Collected" || pickup.PickupStatus == "InService")
                                                    {
                                                        <button onclick="uploadPickupPhotos(@pickup.VehiclePickupId)" 
                                                                class="btn btn-sm btn-info" title="Upload Vehicle Photos">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-camera"></i>
                                                        </button>
                                                    }
                                                    
                                                    @if (pickup.ServiceBooking != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(pickup.ServiceBooking.CustomerPhone))
                                                    {
                                                        <a href="tel:@pickup.ServiceBooking.CustomerPhone" 
                                                           class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" title="Call Customer">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-phone"></i>
                                                        </a>
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </td>
                                        </tr>
                                    }
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center py-5">
                            <i class="fas fa-hand-paper fa-3x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                            <h5 class="text-muted">No pickups assigned</h5>
                            <p class="text-muted">You don't have any pickup assignments at the moment.</p>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        // Auto-refresh the page every 5 minutes to get updated delivery status
        setTimeout(function() {
            location.reload();
        }, 300000); // 5 minutes

        // Update pickup status via AJAX
        async function updatePickupStatus(pickupId, status) {
            const statusMessages = {
                'EnRoute': 'Are you starting the pickup journey?',
                'Collected': 'Have you collected the vehicle from the customer?',
                'Completed': 'Are you marking this pickup as completed?'
            };

            const message = statusMessages[status] || `Are you sure you want to update status to "${status}"?`;
            if (!confirm(message)) {
                return;
            }

            try {
                const response = await fetch('@Url.Action("UpdateStatus", "PickupDropoff")?id=' + pickupId + '&status=' + encodeURIComponent(status), {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]').value
                    }
                });

                const data = await response.json();
                
                if (data.success) {
                    alert('Status updated successfully!');
                    location.reload();
                } else {
                    alert('Error: ' + data.message);
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error updating status:', error);
                alert('Failed to update status. Please try again.');
            }
        }

        // Redirect to photo upload page
        function uploadPickupPhotos(pickupId) {
            window.location.href = `@Url.Action("PhotoUpload", "PickupDropoff")/${pickupId}`;
        }
    </script>
}
```

Build succeeded. Running the application.


Added driver workflow actions for the pickup service. Summary:

## Implementation complete

### Added action buttons to Driver Dashboard (`Views/Driver/Dashboard.cshtml`)

Action buttons shown by pickup status:

1. View Details (always): See full pickup information
2. Start Pickup (Assigned/Scheduled): Start journey → Status: "EnRoute"
3. Mark Collected (EnRoute): Vehicle collected → Status: "Collected"
4. Upload Photos (Collected/InService): Upload vehicle condition photos
5. Call Customer (if phone available): Click-to-call

### Updated JavaScript functions

- `updatePickupStatus()`: AJAX call to update pickup status with confirmation
- `uploadPickupPhotos()`: Navigate to photo upload page
- Auto-refresh dashboard every 5 minutes

### Controller updates (`Controllers/PickupDropoffController.cs`)

- `PhotoUpload` (GET): View for uploading vehicle photos
- `UploadPhotos` (POST): Handles photo uploads and saves to database
- `UpdateStatus` (POST): Updates pickup status via AJAX

### Created PhotoUpload view (`Views/PickupDropoff/PhotoUpload.cshtml`)

- Form to upload multiple photos
- Photo type selection (Pickup, Damage, Interior, Odometer, Other)
- Image preview before upload
- Display of previously uploaded photos
- Pickup details sidebar

### Workflow summary

Driver can:
1. Start pickup journey (EnRoute)
2. Mark vehicle collected (Collected)
3. Upload condition photos
4. Call customer (tap phone number)
5. View details
