Checking the Details view to add the missing action buttons and fix the photo upload crash:


Updating the Details view to include all action buttons and fix photo upload routing:


```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.VehiclePickup
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Pickup Details";
}

<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h3 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-truck"></i> Pickup Details #@Model.VehiclePickupId
                    </h3>
                    @{
                        var statusClass = Model.PickupStatus switch
                        {
                            "Scheduled" => "bg-primary",
                            "EnRoute" => "bg-info",
                            "Collected" => "bg-success",
                            "InService" => "bg-warning",
                            "Completed" => "bg-success",
                            "Delivered" => "bg-success",
                            "Failed" => "bg-danger",
                            _ => "bg-secondary"
                        };
                    }
                    <span class="badge @statusClass fs-6">@Model.PickupStatus</span>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h5><i class="fas fa-car text-primary"></i> Vehicle Information</h5>
                            @if (Model.ServiceBooking != null)
                            {
                                <table class="table table-sm">
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Make:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.ServiceBooking.Make</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Model:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.ServiceBooking.Model</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Year:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.ServiceBooking.Year</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>VIN:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.ServiceBooking.VIN</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Service Type:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.ServiceBooking.ServiceType</td>
                                    </tr>
                                </table>
                            }
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h5><i class="fas fa-user text-success"></i> Customer Information</h5>
                            @if (Model.ServiceBooking != null)
                            {
                                <table class="table table-sm">
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Name:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.ServiceBooking.CustomerName</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Email:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.ServiceBooking.CustomerEmail</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Phone:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.ServiceBooking.CustomerPhone</td>
                                    </tr>
                                </table>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <hr>
                    
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h5><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt text-danger"></i> Pickup Information</h5>
                            <table class="table table-sm">
                                <tr>
                                    <td><strong>Location:</strong></td>
                                    <td>@Model.PickupLocation</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <td><strong>Date:</strong></td>
                                    <td>@Model.PickupDate.ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy")</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <td><strong>Time:</strong></td>
                                    <td>@Model.PickupTime.ToString(@"hh\:mm")</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <td><strong>Created:</strong></td>
                                    <td>@Model.CreatedAt.ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy 'at' h:mm tt")</td>
                                </tr>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h5><i class="fas fa-user-tie text-info"></i> Driver Information</h5>
                            @if (Model.Driver != null)
                            {
                                <table class="table table-sm">
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Name:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.Driver.Name</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Phone:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.Driver.Phone</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Vehicle:</strong></td>
                                        <td>@Model.Driver.VehicleRegistration</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>Rating:</strong></td>
                                        <td>
                                            @for (int i = 1; i <= 5; i++)
                                            {
                                                if (i <= Model.Driver.Rating)
                                                {
                                                    <i class="fas fa-star text-warning"></i>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <i class="far fa-star text-muted"></i>
                                                }
                                            }
                                            <span class="ms-1">(@Model.Driver.Rating.ToString("F1"))</span>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>
                                </table>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="alert alert-warning">
                                    <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i>
                                    No driver assigned yet
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ServiceBooking?.Notes))
                    {
                        <hr>
                        <h5><i class="fas fa-sticky-note text-warning"></i> Service Notes</h5>
                        <div class="alert alert-info">
                            @Model.ServiceBooking.Notes
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="col-md-4">
            <!-- Timeline -->
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-history"></i> Status Timeline
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="timeline">
                        <div class="timeline-item @(Model.PickupStatus == "Scheduled" ? "active" : "")">
                            <div class="timeline-marker bg-primary"></div>
                            <div class="timeline-content">
                                <h6>Scheduled</h6>
                                <small class="text-muted">Pickup request created</small>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="timeline-item @(Model.PickupStatus == "EnRoute" ? "active" : "")">
                            <div class="timeline-marker bg-info"></div>
                            <div class="timeline-content">
                                <h6>En Route</h6>
                                <small class="text-muted">Driver on the way</small>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="timeline-item @(Model.PickupStatus == "Collected" ? "active" : "")">
                            <div class="timeline-marker bg-success"></div>
                            <div class="timeline-content">
                                <h6>Collected</h6>
                                <small class="text-muted">Vehicle picked up</small>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="timeline-item @(Model.PickupStatus == "InService" ? "active" : "")">
                            <div class="timeline-marker bg-warning"></div>
                            <div class="timeline-content">
                                <h6>In Service</h6>
                                <small class="text-muted">At service center</small>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="timeline-item @(Model.PickupStatus == "Completed" ? "active" : "")">
                            <div class="timeline-marker bg-success"></div>
                            <div class="timeline-content">
                                <h6>Completed</h6>
                                <small class="text-muted">Service finished</small>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="timeline-item @(Model.PickupStatus == "Delivered" ? "active" : "")">
                            <div class="timeline-marker bg-success"></div>
                            <div class="timeline-content">
                                <h6>Delivered</h6>
                                <small class="text-muted">Vehicle returned</small>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Actions -->
            <div class="card mt-3">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">
                        <i class="fas fa-cogs"></i> Actions
                    </h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="d-grid gap-2">
                        @if (User.IsInRole("Administrator") || User.IsInRole("ServiceManager"))
                        {
                            @if (Model.Driver == null)
                            {
                                <a asp-action="AssignDriver" asp-route-id="@Model.VehiclePickupId" 
                                   class="btn btn-primary">
                                    <i class="fas fa-user-plus"></i> Assign Driver
                                </a>
                            }
                        }
                        
                        @if (User.IsInRole("Driver"))
                        {
                            @if (Model.PickupStatus == "Scheduled" || Model.PickupStatus == "Assigned")
                            {
                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-success" 
                                        onclick="updateStatus(@Model.VehiclePickupId, 'EnRoute')">
                                    <i class="fas fa-play"></i> Start Pickup
                                </button>
                            }
                            
                            @if (Model.PickupStatus == "EnRoute")
                            {
                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-warning" 
                                        onclick="updateStatus(@Model.VehiclePickupId, 'Collected')">
                                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Mark Collected
                                </button>
                            }
                            
                            @if (Model.PickupStatus == "Collected" || Model.PickupStatus == "InService")
                            {
                                <a href="@Url.Action("PhotoUpload", "PickupDropoff", new { id = Model.VehiclePickupId })" 
                                   class="btn btn-info">
                                    <i class="fas fa-camera"></i> Upload Photos
                                </a>
                            }
                            
                            @if (Model.ServiceBooking != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ServiceBooking.CustomerPhone))
                            {
                                <a href="tel:@Model.ServiceBooking.CustomerPhone" 
                                   class="btn btn-secondary">
                                    <i class="fas fa-phone"></i> Call Customer
                                </a>
                            }
                            
                            @if (Model.PickupStatus == "Collected")
                            {
                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" 
                                        onclick="updateStatus(@Model.VehiclePickupId, 'Completed')">
                                    <i class="fas fa-check-double"></i> Complete Pickup
                                </button>
                            }
                        }
                        
                        <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<style>
.timeline {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 30px;
}

.timeline-item {
    position: relative;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.timeline-item.active .timeline-marker {
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0, 123, 255, 0.25);
}

.timeline-marker {
    position: absolute;
    left: -25px;
    top: 5px;
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid #fff;
}

.timeline-content h6 {
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    font-weight: 600;
}
</style>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        function updateStatus(pickupId, status) {
            if (confirm(`Update status to ${status}?`)) {
                fetch('/PickupDropoff/UpdateStatus', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
                        'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]').value
                    },
                    body: `id=${pickupId}&status=${status}`
                })
                .then(response => response.json())
                .then(data => {
                    if (data.success) {
                        location.reload();
                    } else {
                        alert('Error updating status: ' + data.message);
                    }
                })
                .catch(error => {
                    console.error('Error:', error);
                    alert('An error occurred while updating status');
                });
            }
        }
    </script>
}
```

Fixing the form to reference the correct action:


```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.VehiclePickup
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Upload Vehicle Photos";
    Layout = "~/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml";
}

<div class="container-fluid mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h2><i class="fas fa-camera"></i> Upload Vehicle Condition Photos</h2>
                <a href="@Url.Action("Dashboard", "Driver")" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to Dashboard
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">Pickup #@Model.VehiclePickupId - @Model.ServiceBooking?.Make @Model.ServiceBooking?.Model</h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] != null)
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                            @TempData["SuccessMessage"]
                            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <form asp-action="PhotoUpload" asp-route-id="@Model.VehiclePickupId" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="photoUploadForm">
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="VehiclePickupId" />
                        
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Upload Vehicle Condition Photos</label>
                            <input type="file" name="photos" class="form-control" accept="image/*" multiple required />
                            <small class="form-text text-muted">You can upload multiple photos at once (Front, Back, Left, Right, Interior, etc.)</small>
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Photo Type</label>
                            <select name="photoType" class="form-select" required>
                                <option value="">Select photo type...</option>
                                <option value="Pickup">Pickup Condition</option>
                                <option value="Damage">Damage Documentation</option>
                                <option value="Interior">Interior Condition</option>
                                <option value="Odometer">Odometer Reading</option>
                                <option value="Other">Other</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div class="alert alert-info">
                            <strong>Note:</strong> Please capture clear photos of the vehicle's current condition before pickup. These photos will be used for documentation and insurance purposes.
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                                <i class="fas fa-upload"></i> Upload Photos
                            </button>
                            <a href="@Url.Action("Dashboard", "Driver")" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</a>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">Pickup Details</h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <p><strong>Customer:</strong> @Model.ServiceBooking?.CustomerName</p>
                    <p><strong>Vehicle:</strong> @Model.ServiceBooking?.Make @Model.ServiceBooking?.Model (@Model.ServiceBooking?.Year)</p>
                    <p><strong>Pickup Location:</strong> @Model.PickupLocation</p>
                    <p><strong>Pickup Date:</strong> @Model.PickupDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                    <p><strong>Pickup Time:</strong> @Model.PickupTime.ToString(@"hh\:mm")</p>
                    <p><strong>Status:</strong> 
                        <span class="badge bg-primary">@Model.PickupStatus</span>
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>

            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.PickupPhotos))
            {
                <div class="card mt-3">
                    <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">
                        <h5 class="mb-0">Previously Uploaded Photos</h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        @{
                            var photos = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<string>>(Model.PickupPhotos ?? "[]") ?? new List<string>();
                        }
                        @if (photos.Any())
                        {
                            <div class="row g-2">
                                @foreach (var photo in photos)
                                {
                                    <div class="col-6">
                                        <img src="@photo" class="img-fluid rounded" alt="Pickup photo" style="max-height: 150px;" />
                                    </div>
                                }
                            </div>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <p class="text-muted">No photos uploaded yet.</p>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        // Preview uploaded images before submission
        document.querySelector('input[name="photos"]').addEventListener('change', function(e) {
            const previewContainer = document.createElement('div');
            previewContainer.className = 'row g-2 mt-2';
            
            const files = e.target.files;
            for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function(event) {
                    const col = document.createElement('div');
                    col.className = 'col-4';
                    col.innerHTML = `<img src="${event.target.result}" class="img-fluid rounded" style="max-height: 150px;" />`;
                    previewContainer.appendChild(col);
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(files[i]);
            }
            
            // Remove existing preview
            const existingPreview = document.getElementById('imagePreview');
            if (existingPreview) {
                existingPreview.remove();
            }
            
            // Add new preview
            previewContainer.id = 'imagePreview';
            e.target.parentNode.appendChild(previewContainer);
        });
    </script>
}


```

Verifying the controller action signature:


Updating the form to use `UploadPhotos` (POST) instead of `PhotoUpload`:


```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.VehiclePickup
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Upload Vehicle Photos";
    Layout = "~/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml";
}

<div class="container-fluid mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h2><i class="fas fa-camera"></i> Upload Vehicle Condition Photos</h2>
                <a href="@Url.Action("Dashboard", "Driver")" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to Dashboard
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">Pickup #@Model.VehiclePickupId - @Model.ServiceBooking?.Make @Model.ServiceBooking?.Model</h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] != null)
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                            @TempData["SuccessMessage"]
                            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                        </div>
                    }

                    <form asp-action="UploadPhotos" asp-route-id="@Model.VehiclePickupId" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="photoUploadForm">
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="VehiclePickupId" />
                        
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Upload Vehicle Condition Photos</label>
                            <input type="file" name="photos" class="form-control" accept="image/*" multiple required />
                            <small class="form-text text-muted">You can upload multiple photos at once (Front, Back, Left, Right, Interior, etc.)</small>
                        </div>

                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label class="form-label">Photo Type</label>
                            <select name="photoType" class="form-select" required>
                                <option value="">Select photo type...</option>
                                <option value="Pickup">Pickup Condition</option>
                                <option value="Damage">Damage Documentation</option>
                                <option value="Interior">Interior Condition</option>
                                <option value="Odometer">Odometer Reading</option>
                                <option value="Other">Other</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div class="alert alert-info">
                            <strong>Note:</strong> Please capture clear photos of the vehicle's current condition before pickup. These photos will be used for documentation and insurance purposes.
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                                <i class="fas fa-upload"></i> Upload Photos
                            </button>
                            <a href="@Url.Action("Dashboard", "Driver")" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</a>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
                    <h5 class="mb-0">Pickup Details</h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <p><strong>Customer:</strong> @Model.ServiceBooking?.CustomerName</p>
                    <p><strong>Vehicle:</strong> @Model.ServiceBooking?.Make @Model.ServiceBooking?.Model (@Model.ServiceBooking?.Year)</p>
                    <p><strong>Pickup Location:</strong> @Model.PickupLocation</p>
                    <p><strong>Pickup Date:</strong> @Model.PickupDate.ToString("MMM dd, yyyy")</p>
                    <p><strong>Pickup Time:</strong> @Model.PickupTime.ToString(@"hh\:mm")</p>
                    <p><strong>Status:</strong> 
                        <span class="badge bg-primary">@Model.PickupStatus</span>
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>

            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.PickupPhotos))
            {
                <div class="card mt-3">
                    <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">
                        <h5 class="mb-0">Previously Uploaded Photos</h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        @{
                            var photos = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<string>>(Model.PickupPhotos ?? "[]") ?? new List<string>();
                        }
                        @if (photos.Any())
                        {
                            <div class="row g-2">
                                @foreach (var photo in photos)
                                {
                                    <div class="col-6">
                                        <img src="@photo" class="img-fluid rounded" alt="Pickup photo" style="max-height: 150px;" />
                                    </div>
                                }
                            </div>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <p class="text-muted">No photos uploaded yet.</p>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        // Preview uploaded images before submission
        document.querySelector('input[name="photos"]').addEventListener('change', function(e) {
            const previewContainer = document.createElement('div');
            previewContainer.className = 'row g-2 mt-2';
            
            const files = e.target.files;
            for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function(event) {
                    const col = document.createElement('div');
                    col.className = 'col-4';
                    col.innerHTML = `<img src="${event.target.result}" class="img-fluid rounded" style="max-height: 150px;" />`;
                    previewContainer.appendChild(col);
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(files[i]);
            }
            
            // Remove existing preview
            const existingPreview = document.getElementById('imagePreview');
            if (existingPreview) {
                existingPreview.remove();
            }
            
            // Add new preview
            previewContainer.id = 'imagePreview';
            e.target.parentNode.appendChild(previewContainer);
        });
    </script>
}


```

Verifying the `UploadPhotos` action is configured correctly in the controller:

## **Fixed photo upload routing**

### Changes made
1. PhotoUpload.cshtml
   - Switched from `asp-action="PhotoUpload"` to `asp-action="UploadPhotos"`
   - Adds `asp-route-id="@Model.VehiclePickupId"` to include the route parameter
2. Flow
   - GET: `/PickupDropoff/PhotoUpload/{id}` shows the form
   - POST: `/PickupDropoff/UploadPhotos/{id}` processes uploads
   - POST redirects to `PhotoUpload` with a success message

### Routes
- Display: `PhotoUpload` (GET)
- Process: `UploadPhotos` (POST)

2. Open a pickup in "EnRoute" or "Collected" status
3. Click the "Upload Photos" button
4. Upload photos; the form submits correctly without a 404

Creating a task list and applying fixes:


```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.ServiceChecklist
@using AutoEdge.Models.Entities
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Service Checklist";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h2><i class="fas fa-clipboard-list me-2"></i>Service Checklist</h2>
                <a href="/Mechanics/ServiceChecklists" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-2"></i>Back to Checklists
                </a>
            </div>

            <!-- Service Information -->
            <div class="card mb-4">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>Service Information</h5>
                    <div>
                        <span class="badge @(Model.IsCompleted ? "bg-success" : "bg-warning") fs-6">
                            @(Model.IsCompleted ? "Completed" : "In Progress")
                        </span>
                        <span class="badge bg-info ms-2">@Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")% Complete</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Vehicle & Customer</h6>
                            <p><strong>Vehicle:</strong> @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Make @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Model (@Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Year)</p>
                            <p><strong>Customer:</strong> @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.CustomerName</p>
                            <p><strong>Reference:</strong> <code>@Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Reference</code></p>
                            <p><strong>Service Type:</strong> @Model.ServiceType</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Timing & Progress</h6>
                            <p><strong>Started:</strong> @Model.StartedAt.ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</p>
                            @if (Model.CompletedAt.HasValue)
                            {
                                <p><strong>Completed:</strong> @Model.CompletedAt.Value.ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</p>
                                <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @((Model.CompletedAt.Value - Model.StartedAt).ToString(@"hh\:mm"))</p>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @((DateTime.UtcNow - Model.StartedAt).ToString(@"hh\:mm")) (ongoing)</p>
                            }
                            <p><strong>Progress:</strong> @Model.CompletedItemsCount of @Model.TotalItemsCount tasks completed</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Progress Bar -->
                    <div class="mt-3">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2">
                            <span><strong>Service Progress</strong></span>
                            <span>@Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")%</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="progress" style="height: 20px;">
                            <div class="progress-bar @(Model.ProgressPercentage == 100 ? "bg-success" : Model.ProgressPercentage > 0 ? "bg-primary" : "bg-secondary")" 
                                 role="progressbar" 
                                 style="width: @Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")%" 
                                 aria-valuenow="@Model.ProgressPercentage" 
                                 aria-valuemin="0" 
                                 aria-valuemax="100">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Cost Summary -->
                    <div class="row mt-3">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Cost Summary</h6>
                            <p><strong>Estimated Total:</strong> R @Model.TotalEstimatedCost.ToString("F2")</p>
                            <p><strong>Actual Cost (so far):</strong> 
                                <span class="@(Model.TotalActualCost > Model.TotalEstimatedCost ? "text-danger" : "text-success")">
                                    R @Model.TotalActualCost.ToString("F2")
                                </span>
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Duration Summary</h6>
                            <p><strong>Estimated Duration:</strong> @Model.TotalEstimatedDurationMinutes minutes</p>
                            <p><strong>Actual Duration:</strong> @Model.TotalActualDurationMinutes minutes</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="row">
                <!-- Checklist Items -->
                <div class="col-md-8">
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-tasks me-2"></i>Checklist Items</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (Model.Items.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="list-group">
                                    @foreach (var item in Model.Items.OrderBy(i => i.Id))
                                    {
                                        <div class="list-group-item @(item.IsCompleted ? "list-group-item-success" : "")">
                                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
                                                <div class="flex-grow-1">
                                                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                                                        @if (item.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-success me-3"></i>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <i class="fas fa-circle text-muted me-3"></i>
                                                        }
                                                        <div>
                                                            <h6 class="mb-1">@item.TaskName</h6>
                                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Description))
                                                            {
                                                                <p class="mb-1 text-muted">@item.Description</p>
                                                            }
                                                            @if (item.IsCompleted && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Notes))
                                                            {
                                                                <small class="text-success"><strong>Notes:</strong> @item.Notes</small>
                                                            }
                                                        </div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div class="text-end">
                                                    @if (item.IsCompleted)
                                                    {
                                                        <small class="text-success">Completed<br/>@item.CompletedAt?.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                                        @if (item.ActualCost.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            <br><strong class="@(item.ActualCost > item.EstimatedCost ? "text-danger" : "text-success")">
                                                                $@item.ActualCost.Value.ToString("F2")
                                                            </strong>
                                                        }
                                                    }
                                                    else
                                                    {
                                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success" onclick="completeItem(@item.Id)">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i>Complete
                                                        </button>
                                                        @if (item.EstimatedCost.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            <br><small class="text-muted">Est: $@item.EstimatedCost.Value.ToString("F2")</small>
                                                        }
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-center py-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list fa-2x text-muted mb-2"></i>
                                    <p class="text-muted">No checklist items found.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Photos & Actions -->
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <!-- Photo Upload -->
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-camera me-2"></i>Before/After Photos</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                            {
                                <form id="photoUploadForm" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="checklistId" value="@Model.Id" />
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="photoType" class="form-label">Photo Type:</label>
                                        <select name="photoType" class="form-select" required>
                                            <option value="">Select photo type...</option>
                                            <option value="Before">Before Service</option>
                                            <option value="During">During Service</option>
                                            <option value="After">After Service</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="photo" class="form-label">Photo:</label>
                                        <input type="file" name="photo" class="form-control" accept="image/*" required />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="description" class="form-label">Description (Optional):</label>
                                        <textarea name="description" class="form-control" rows="2" placeholder="Describe what's shown in the photo..."></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100">
                                        <i class="fas fa-upload me-2"></i>Upload Photo
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <p class="text-muted">Photo upload is disabled for completed checklists.</p>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Photos Gallery -->
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-images me-2"></i>Photos (@Model.Photos.Count)</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (Model.Photos.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="row">
                                    @foreach (var photo in Model.Photos.OrderBy(p => p.TakenAt))
                                    {
                                        <div class="col-6 mb-3">
                                            <div class="position-relative">
                                                <img src="@photo.FilePath" class="img-thumbnail w-100" style="height: 100px; object-fit: cover;" 
                                                     data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#photoModal" 
                                                     data-photo-path="@photo.FilePath" data-photo-desc="@photo.Description" data-photo-type="@photo.PhotoType" />
                                                <span class="badge bg-primary position-absolute top-0 start-0 m-1">@photo.PhotoType</span>
                                            </div>
                                            <small class="text-muted d-block">@photo.TakenAt.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-center py-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-images fa-2x text-muted mb-2"></i>
                                    <p class="text-muted">No photos uploaded yet.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Complete Checklist -->
                    @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                    {
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="card-header">
                                <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-flag-checkered me-2"></i>Complete Service</h5>
                            </div>
                            <div class="card-body">
                                <form id="completeChecklistForm">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="checklistId" value="@Model.Id" />
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="completionNotes" class="form-label">Final Notes:</label>
                                        <textarea name="completionNotes" class="form-control" rows="3" placeholder="Any final notes about the service..."></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success w-100">
                                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>Complete Service
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Photo Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="photoModal" tabindex="-1">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h5 class="modal-title" id="photoModalTitle">Photo</h5>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body text-center">
                <img id="modalPhoto" class="img-fluid" style="max-height: 500px;" />
                <p id="modalPhotoDesc" class="mt-3 text-muted"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Photo upload form
    document.getElementById('photoUploadForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        
        fetch('/Mechanics/UploadPhoto', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
            },
            body: formData
        })
        .then(response => response.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) {
                alert('Photo uploaded successfully!');
                location.reload();
            } else {
                alert('Error uploading photo: ' + data.message);
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
            alert('Error uploading photo.');
        });
    });

    // Complete checklist form
    document.getElementById('completeChecklistForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to complete this service checklist? This action cannot be undone.')) {
            return;
        }
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const checklistId = formData.get('checklistId');
        const notes = formData.get('completionNotes');
        
        console.log('Completing checklist:', checklistId, 'with notes:', notes);
        
        fetch('/Mechanics/CompleteChecklist', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
                'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
            },
            body: `checklistId=${checklistId}&notes=${encodeURIComponent(notes || '')}`
        })
        .then(response => {
            console.log('Response status:', response.status);
            return response.json();
        })
        .then(data => {
            console.log('Response data:', data);
            if (data.success) {
                alert('Service checklist completed successfully!');
                location.reload();
            } else {
                alert('Error completing checklist: ' + data.message);
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
            alert('Error completing checklist: ' + error.message);
        });
    });

    // Photo modal
    document.getElementById('photoModal').addEventListener('show.bs.modal', function(event) {
        const button = event.relatedTarget;
        const photoPath = button.getAttribute('data-photo-path');
        const photoDesc = button.getAttribute('data-photo-desc');
        const photoType = button.getAttribute('data-photo-type');
        
        document.getElementById('modalPhoto').src = photoPath;
        document.getElementById('modalPhotoTitle').textContent = photoType + ' Photo';
        document.getElementById('modalPhotoDesc').textContent = photoDesc || 'No description provided.';
    });
});

function completeItem(itemId) {
    const notes = prompt('Add notes for this completed item (optional):');
    const actualCost = prompt('Enter actual cost (optional, press Cancel to use estimated cost):');
    const actualDuration = prompt('Enter actual duration in minutes (optional, press Cancel to use estimated duration):');
    
    const cost = actualCost && !isNaN(parseFloat(actualCost)) ? parseFloat(actualCost) : null;
    const duration = actualDuration && !isNaN(parseInt(actualDuration)) ? parseInt(actualDuration) : null;
    
    fetch('/Mechanics/CompleteChecklistItem', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
            'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
        },
        body: `itemId=${itemId}&notes=${encodeURIComponent(notes || '')}&actualCost=${cost || ''}&actualDurationMinutes=${duration || ''}`
    })
    .then(response => response.json())
    .then(data => {
        if (data.success) {
            alert('Checklist item completed successfully!');
            location.reload();
        } else {
            alert('Error completing item: ' + data.message);
        }
    })
    .catch(error => {
        console.error('Error:', error);
        alert('Error completing item.');
    });
}
</script>

```

```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.ServiceChecklist
@using AutoEdge.Models.Entities
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Service Checklist";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h2><i class="fas fa-clipboard-list me-2"></i>Service Checklist</h2>
                <a href="/Mechanics/ServiceChecklists" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-2"></i>Back to Checklists
                </a>
            </div>

            <!-- Service Information -->
            <div class="card mb-4">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>Service Information</h5>
                    <div>
                        <span class="badge @(Model.IsCompleted ? "bg-success" : "bg-warning") fs-6">
                            @(Model.IsCompleted ? "Completed" : "In Progress")
                        </span>
                        <span class="badge bg-info ms-2">@Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")% Complete</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Vehicle & Customer</h6>
                            <p><strong>Vehicle:</strong> @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Make @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Model (@Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Year)</p>
                            <p><strong>Customer:</strong> @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.CustomerName</p>
                            <p><strong>Reference:</strong> <code>@Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Reference</code></p>
                            <p><strong>Service Type:</strong> @Model.ServiceType</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Timing & Progress</h6>
                            <p><strong>Started:</strong> @Model.StartedAt.ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</p>
                            @if (Model.CompletedAt.HasValue)
                            {
                                <p><strong>Completed:</strong> @Model.CompletedAt.Value.ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</p>
                                <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @((Model.CompletedAt.Value - Model.StartedAt).ToString(@"hh\:mm"))</p>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @((DateTime.UtcNow - Model.StartedAt).ToString(@"hh\:mm")) (ongoing)</p>
                            }
                            <p><strong>Progress:</strong> @Model.CompletedItemsCount of @Model.TotalItemsCount tasks completed</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Progress Bar -->
                    <div class="mt-3">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2">
                            <span><strong>Service Progress</strong></span>
                            <span>@Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")%</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="progress" style="height: 20px;">
                            <div class="progress-bar @(Model.ProgressPercentage == 100 ? "bg-success" : Model.ProgressPercentage > 0 ? "bg-primary" : "bg-secondary")" 
                                 role="progressbar" 
                                 style="width: @Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")%" 
                                 aria-valuenow="@Model.ProgressPercentage" 
                                 aria-valuemin="0" 
                                 aria-valuemax="100">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Cost Summary -->
                    <div class="row mt-3">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Cost Summary</h6>
                            <p><strong>Estimated Total:</strong> R @Model.TotalEstimatedCost.ToString("F2")</p>
                            <p><strong>Actual Cost (so far):</strong> 
                                <span class="@(Model.TotalActualCost > Model.TotalEstimatedCost ? "text-danger" : "text-success")">
                                    R @Model.TotalActualCost.ToString("F2")
                                </span>
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Duration Summary</h6>
                            <p><strong>Estimated Duration:</strong> @Model.TotalEstimatedDurationMinutes minutes</p>
                            <p><strong>Actual Duration:</strong> @Model.TotalActualDurationMinutes minutes</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="row">
                <!-- Checklist Items -->
                <div class="col-md-8">
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-tasks me-2"></i>Checklist Items</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (Model.Items.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="list-group">
                                    @foreach (var item in Model.Items.OrderBy(i => i.Id))
                                    {
                                        <div class="list-group-item @(item.IsCompleted ? "list-group-item-success" : "")">
                                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
                                                <div class="flex-grow-1">
                                                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                                                        @if (item.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-success me-3"></i>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <i class="fas fa-circle text-muted me-3"></i>
                                                        }
                                                        <div>
                                                            <h6 class="mb-1">@item.TaskName</h6>
                                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Description))
                                                            {
                                                                <p class="mb-1 text-muted">@item.Description</p>
                                                            }
                                                            @if (item.IsCompleted && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Notes))
                                                            {
                                                                <small class="text-success"><strong>Notes:</strong> @item.Notes</small>
                                                            }
                                                        </div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div class="text-end">
                                                    @if (item.IsCompleted)
                                                    {
                                                        <small class="text-success">Completed<br/>@item.CompletedAt?.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                                        @if (item.ActualCost.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            <br><strong class="@(item.ActualCost > item.EstimatedCost ? "text-danger" : "text-success")">
                                                                R @item.ActualCost.Value.ToString("F2")
                                                            </strong>
                                                        }
                                                    }
                                                    else
                                                    {
                                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success" onclick="completeItem(@item.Id)">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i>Complete
                                                        </button>
                                                        @if (item.EstimatedCost.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            <br><small class="text-muted">Est: R @item.EstimatedCost.Value.ToString("F2")</small>
                                                        }
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-center py-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list fa-2x text-muted mb-2"></i>
                                    <p class="text-muted">No checklist items found.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Photos & Actions -->
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <!-- Photo Upload -->
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-camera me-2"></i>Before/After Photos</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                            {
                                <form id="photoUploadForm" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="checklistId" value="@Model.Id" />
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="photoType" class="form-label">Photo Type:</label>
                                        <select name="photoType" class="form-select" required>
                                            <option value="">Select photo type...</option>
                                            <option value="Before">Before Service</option>
                                            <option value="During">During Service</option>
                                            <option value="After">After Service</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="photo" class="form-label">Photo:</label>
                                        <input type="file" name="photo" class="form-control" accept="image/*" required />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="description" class="form-label">Description (Optional):</label>
                                        <textarea name="description" class="form-control" rows="2" placeholder="Describe what's shown in the photo..."></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100">
                                        <i class="fas fa-upload me-2"></i>Upload Photo
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <p class="text-muted">Photo upload is disabled for completed checklists.</p>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Photos Gallery -->
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-images me-2"></i>Photos (@Model.Photos.Count)</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (Model.Photos.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="row">
                                    @foreach (var photo in Model.Photos.OrderBy(p => p.TakenAt))
                                    {
                                        <div class="col-6 mb-3">
                                            <div class="position-relative">
                                                <img src="@photo.FilePath" class="img-thumbnail w-100" style="height: 100px; object-fit: cover;" 
                                                     data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#photoModal" 
                                                     data-photo-path="@photo.FilePath" data-photo-desc="@photo.Description" data-photo-type="@photo.PhotoType" />
                                                <span class="badge bg-primary position-absolute top-0 start-0 m-1">@photo.PhotoType</span>
                                            </div>
                                            <small class="text-muted d-block">@photo.TakenAt.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-center py-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-images fa-2x text-muted mb-2"></i>
                                    <p class="text-muted">No photos uploaded yet.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Complete Checklist -->
                    @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                    {
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="card-header">
                                <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-flag-checkered me-2"></i>Complete Service</h5>
                            </div>
                            <div class="card-body">
                                <form id="completeChecklistForm">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="checklistId" value="@Model.Id" />
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="completionNotes" class="form-label">Final Notes:</label>
                                        <textarea name="completionNotes" class="form-control" rows="3" placeholder="Any final notes about the service..."></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success w-100">
                                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>Complete Service
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Photo Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="photoModal" tabindex="-1">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h5 class="modal-title" id="photoModalTitle">Photo</h5>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body text-center">
                <img id="modalPhoto" class="img-fluid" style="max-height: 500px;" />
                <p id="modalPhotoDesc" class="mt-3 text-muted"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Photo upload form
    document.getElementById('photoUploadForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        
        fetch('/Mechanics/UploadPhoto', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
            },
            body: formData
        })
        .then(response => response.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) {
                alert('Photo uploaded successfully!');
                location.reload();
            } else {
                alert('Error uploading photo: ' + data.message);
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
            alert('Error uploading photo.');
        });
    });

    // Complete checklist form
    document.getElementById('completeChecklistForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to complete this service checklist? This action cannot be undone.')) {
            return;
        }
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const checklistId = formData.get('checklistId');
        const notes = formData.get('completionNotes');
        
        console.log('Completing checklist:', checklistId, 'with notes:', notes);
        
        fetch('/Mechanics/CompleteChecklist', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
                'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
            },
            body: `checklistId=${checklistId}&notes=${encodeURIComponent(notes || '')}`
        })
        .then(response => {
            console.log('Response status:', response.status);
            return response.json();
        })
        .then(data => {
            console.log('Response data:', data);
            if (data.success) {
                alert('Service checklist completed successfully!');
                location.reload();
            } else {
                alert('Error completing checklist: ' + data.message);
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
            alert('Error completing checklist: ' + error.message);
        });
    });

    // Photo modal
    document.getElementById('photoModal').addEventListener('show.bs.modal', function(event) {
        const button = event.relatedTarget;
        const photoPath = button.getAttribute('data-photo-path');
        const photoDesc = button.getAttribute('data-photo-desc');
        const photoType = button.getAttribute('data-photo-type');
        
        document.getElementById('modalPhoto').src = photoPath;
        document.getElementById('modalPhotoTitle').textContent = photoType + ' Photo';
        document.getElementById('modalPhotoDesc').textContent = photoDesc || 'No description provided.';
    });
});

function completeItem(itemId) {
    const notes = prompt('Add notes for this completed item (optional):');
    const actualCost = prompt('Enter actual cost (optional, press Cancel to use estimated cost):');
    const actualDuration = prompt('Enter actual duration in minutes (optional, press Cancel to use estimated duration):');
    
    const cost = actualCost && !isNaN(parseFloat(actualCost)) ? parseFloat(actualCost) : null;
    const duration = actualDuration && !isNaN(parseInt(actualDuration)) ? parseInt(actualDuration) : null;
    
    fetch('/Mechanics/CompleteChecklistItem', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
            'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
        },
        body: `itemId=${itemId}&notes=${encodeURIComponent(notes || '')}&actualCost=${cost || ''}&actualDurationMinutes=${duration || ''}`
    })
    .then(response => response.json())
    .then(data => {
        if (data.success) {
            alert('Checklist item completed successfully!');
            location.reload();
        } else {
            alert('Error completing item: ' + data.message);
        }
    })
    .catch(error => {
        console.error('Error:', error);
        alert('Error completing item.');
    });
}
</script>

```

```aspnetcorerazor
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "QR Code Scanner - Technician Dashboard";
}

<!-- QR Scanner Library - Using QuaggaJS for better compatibility -->
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/quagga/0.12.1/quagga.min.js"></script>
<!-- Alternative QR Scanner Library -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jsqr@1.4.0/dist/jsQR.js"></script>

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">
                    <h3 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-qrcode me-2"></i>Service Booking QR Code Scanner</h3>
                    <p class="mb-0 mt-1">Scan customer QR codes to check them in for service</p>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <div id="scanner-section">
                        <div class="text-center mb-4">
                            <h5>Scan Customer QR Code</h5>
                            <p class="text-muted">Scan the QR code from the customer's email to verify and check in their service booking.</p>
                        </div>

                            <!-- Manual QR Code Input (Fallback) -->
                            <div class="mb-4">
                                <label for="qrCodeInput" class="form-label">QR Code Data (Manual Entry):</label>
                                <div class="input-group">
                                    <input type="text" id="qrCodeInput" class="form-control" placeholder="Enter QR code data manually (e.g., BOOKING:123)" />
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" id="manualVerifyButton" disabled>
                                        <i class="fas fa-search me-2"></i>Verify
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                                <small class="form-text text-muted">You can manually enter QR code data if camera scanning doesn't work.</small>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Scan Button -->
                            <div class="mb-4 text-center">
                                <button class="btn btn-success btn-lg" type="button" id="scanButton">
                                    <i class="fas fa-camera me-2"></i>Start QR Scanner
                                </button>
                                <button class="btn btn-info btn-lg ms-2" type="button" id="generateTestQRButton">
                                    <i class="fas fa-qrcode me-2"></i>Generate Test QR
                                </button>
                                <small class="form-text text-muted d-block mt-2">Click to start camera and scan QR codes automatically, or generate a test QR code.</small>
                            </div>

                        <!-- Camera Section -->
                        <div id="camera-section" class="text-center mb-4" style="display: none;">
                            <video id="video" width="300" height="200" style="border: 2px solid #28a745;"></video>
                            <div class="mt-2">
                                <button class="btn btn-success" id="captureButton">
                                    <i class="fas fa-camera me-2"></i>Capture QR Code
                                </button>
                                <button class="btn btn-secondary" id="stopCameraButton">
                                    <i class="fas fa-stop me-2"></i>Stop Camera
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                            <!-- Action Buttons (Automatic - No manual verification needed) -->
                            <div class="text-center" style="display: none;">
                                <button class="btn btn-success btn-lg" id="verifyButton" disabled>
                                    <i class="fas fa-search me-2"></i>Verify QR Code
                                </button>
                            </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Loading -->
```
