**Cursor**

Progress bar is present but not visible due to CSS. Checking the ServiceChecklist view markup and styling:


The progress bar is styled. Bootstrap might be hiding it. Improving visibility and adding animation:


```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.ServiceChecklist
@using AutoEdge.Models.Entities
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Service Checklist";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h2><i class="fas fa-clipboard-list me-2"></i>Service Checklist</h2>
                <a href="/Mechanics/ServiceChecklists" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-2"></i>Back to Checklists
                </a>
            </div>

            <!-- Service Information -->
            <div class="card mb-4">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>Service Information</h5>
                    <div>
                        <span class="badge @(Model.IsCompleted ? "bg-success" : "bg-warning") fs-6">
                            @(Model.IsCompleted ? "Completed" : "In Progress")
                        </span>
                        <span class="badge bg-info ms-2">@Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")% Complete</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Vehicle & Customer</h6>
                            <p><strong>Vehicle:</strong> @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Make @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Model (@Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Year)</p>
                            <p><strong>Customer:</strong> @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.CustomerName</p>
                            <p><strong>Reference:</strong> <code>@Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Reference</code></p>
                            <p><strong>Service Type:</strong> @Model.ServiceType</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Timing & Progress</h6>
                            <p><strong>Started:</strong> @Model.StartedAt.ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</p>
                            @if (Model.CompletedAt.HasValue)
                            {
                                <p><strong>Completed:</strong> @Model.CompletedAt.Value.ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</p>
                                <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @((Model.CompletedAt.Value - Model.StartedAt).ToString(@"hh\:mm"))</p>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @((DateTime.UtcNow - Model.StartedAt).ToString(@"hh\:mm")) (ongoing)</p>
                            }
                            <p><strong>Progress:</strong> @Model.CompletedItemsCount of @Model.TotalItemsCount tasks completed</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Progress Bar -->
                    <div class="mt-3">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2">
                            <span><strong>Service Progress</strong></span>
                            <span class="badge @(Model.ProgressPercentage == 100 ? "bg-success" : Model.ProgressPercentage > 0 ? "bg-primary" : "bg-secondary")">@Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")%</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="progress" style="height: 25px; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; background-color: #e9ecef;">
                            <div class="progress-bar progress-bar-striped progress-bar-animated 
                                        @(Model.ProgressPercentage == 100 ? "bg-success" : Model.ProgressPercentage > 0 ? "bg-primary" : "bg-secondary")" 
                                 role="progressbar" 
                                 style="width: @Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")%; transition: width 0.6s ease;" 
                                 aria-valuenow="@Model.ProgressPercentage" 
                                 aria-valuemin="0" 
                                 aria-valuemax="100">
                                <strong>@Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")%</strong>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Cost Summary -->
                    <div class="row mt-3">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Cost Summary</h6>
                            <p><strong>Estimated Total:</strong> R @Model.TotalEstimatedCost.ToString("F2")</p>
                            <p><strong>Actual Cost (so far):</strong> 
                                <span class="@(Model.TotalActualCost > Model.TotalEstimatedCost ? "text-danger" : "text-success")">
                                    R @Model.TotalActualCost.ToString("F2")
                                </span>
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Duration Summary</h6>
                            <p><strong>Estimated Duration:</strong> @Model.TotalEstimatedDurationMinutes minutes</p>
                            <p><strong>Actual Duration:</strong> @Model.TotalActualDurationMinutes minutes</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="row">
                <!-- Checklist Items -->
                <div class="col-md-8">
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-tasks me-2"></i>Checklist Items</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (Model.Items.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="list-group">
                                    @foreach (var item in Model.Items.OrderBy(i => i.Id))
                                    {
                                        <div class="list-group-item @(item.IsCompleted ? "list-group-item-success" : "")">
                                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
                                                <div class="flex-grow-1">
                                                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                                                        @if (item.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-success me-3"></i>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <i class="fas fa-circle text-muted me-3"></i>
                                                        }
                                                        <div>
                                                            <h6 class="mb-1">@item.TaskName</h6>
                                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Description))
                                                            {
                                                                <p class="mb-1 text-muted">@item.Description</p>
                                                            }
                                                            @if (item.IsCompleted && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Notes))
                                                            {
                                                                <small class="text-success"><strong>Notes:</strong> @item.Notes</small>
                                                            }
                                                        </div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div class="text-end">
                                                    @if (item.IsCompleted)
                                                    {
                                                        <small class="text-success">Completed<br/>@item.CompletedAt?.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                                        @if (item.ActualCost.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            <br><strong class="@(item.ActualCost > item.EstimatedCost ? "text-danger" : "text-success")">
                                                                R @item.ActualCost.Value.ToString("F2")
                                                            </strong>
                                                        }
                                                    }
                                                    else
                                                    {
                                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success" onclick="completeItem(@item.Id)">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i>Complete
                                                        </button>
                                                        @if (item.EstimatedCost.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            <br><small class="text-muted">Est: R @item.EstimatedCost.Value.ToString("F2")</small>
                                                        }
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-center py-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list fa-2x text-muted mb-2"></i>
                                    <p class="text-muted">No checklist items found.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Photos & Actions -->
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <!-- Photo Upload -->
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-camera me-2"></i>Before/After Photos</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                            {
                                <form id="photoUploadForm" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="checklistId" value="@Model.Id" />
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="photoType" class="form-label">Photo Type:</label>
                                        <select name="photoType" class="form-select" required>
                                            <option value="">Select photo type...</option>
                                            <option value="Before">Before Service</option>
                                            <option value="During">During Service</option>
                                            <option value="After">After Service</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="photo" class="form-label">Photo:</label>
                                        <input type="file" name="photo" class="form-control" accept="image/*" required />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="description" class="form-label">Description (Optional):</label>
                                        <textarea name="description" class="form-control" rows="2" placeholder="Describe what's shown in the photo..."></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100">
                                        <i class="fas fa-upload me-2"></i>Upload Photo
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <p class="text-muted">Photo upload is disabled for completed checklists.</p>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Photos Gallery -->
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-images me-2"></i>Photos (@Model.Photos.Count)</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (Model.Photos.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="row">
                                    @foreach (var photo in Model.Photos.OrderBy(p => p.TakenAt))
                                    {
                                        <div class="col-6 mb-3">
                                            <div class="position-relative">
                                                <img src="@photo.FilePath" class="img-thumbnail w-100" style="height: 100px; object-fit: cover;" 
                                                     data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#photoModal" 
                                                     data-photo-path="@photo.FilePath" data-photo-desc="@photo.Description" data-photo-type="@photo.PhotoType" />
                                                <span class="badge bg-primary position-absolute top-0 start-0 m-1">@photo.PhotoType</span>
                                            </div>
                                            <small class="text-muted d-block">@photo.TakenAt.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-center py-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-images fa-2x text-muted mb-2"></i>
                                    <p class="text-muted">No photos uploaded yet.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Complete Checklist -->
                    @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                    {
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="card-header">
                                <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-flag-checkered me-2"></i>Complete Service</h5>
                            </div>
                            <div class="card-body">
                                <form id="completeChecklistForm">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="checklistId" value="@Model.Id" />
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="completionNotes" class="form-label">Final Notes:</label>
                                        <textarea name="completionNotes" class="form-control" rows="3" placeholder="Any final notes about the service..."></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success w-100">
                                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>Complete Service
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Photo Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="photoModal" tabindex="-1">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h5 class="modal-title" id="photoModalTitle">Photo</h5>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body text-center">
                <img id="modalPhoto" class="img-fluid" style="max-height: 500px;" />
                <p id="modalPhotoDesc" class="mt-3 text-muted"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Photo upload form
    document.getElementById('photoUploadForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        
        fetch('/Mechanics/UploadPhoto', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
            },
            body: formData
        })
        .then(response => response.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) {
                alert('Photo uploaded successfully!');
                location.reload();
            } else {
                alert('Error uploading photo: ' + data.message);
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
            alert('Error uploading photo.');
        });
    });

    // Complete checklist form
    document.getElementById('completeChecklistForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to complete this service checklist? This action cannot be undone.')) {
            return;
        }
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const checklistId = formData.get('checklistId');
        const notes = formData.get('completionNotes');
        
        console.log('Completing checklist:', checklistId, 'with notes:', notes);
        
        fetch('/Mechanics/CompleteChecklist', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
                'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
            },
            body: `checklistId=${checklistId}&notes=${encodeURIComponent(notes || '')}`
        })
        .then(response => {
            console.log('Response status:', response.status);
            return response.json();
        })
        .then(data => {
            console.log('Response data:', data);
            if (data.success) {
                alert('Service checklist completed successfully!');
                location.reload();
            } else {
                alert('Error completing checklist: ' + data.message);
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
            alert('Error completing checklist: ' + error.message);
        });
    });

    // Photo modal
    document.getElementById('photoModal').addEventListener('show.bs.modal', function(event) {
        const button = event.relatedTarget;
        const photoPath = button.getAttribute('data-photo-path');
        const photoDesc = button.getAttribute('data-photo-desc');
        const photoType = button.getAttribute('data-photo-type');
        
        document.getElementById('modalPhoto').src = photoPath;
        document.getElementById('modalPhotoTitle').textContent = photoType + ' Photo';
        document.getElementById('modalPhotoDesc').textContent = photoDesc || 'No description provided.';
    });
});

function completeItem(itemId) {
    const notes = prompt('Add notes for this completed item (optional):');
    const actualCost = prompt('Enter actual cost (optional, press Cancel to use estimated cost):');
    const actualDuration = prompt('Enter actual duration in minutes (optional, press Cancel to use estimated duration):');
    
    const cost = actualCost && !isNaN(parseFloat(actualCost)) ? parseFloat(actualCost) : null;
    const duration = actualDuration && !isNaN(parseInt(actualDuration)) ? parseInt(actualDuration) : null;
    
    fetch('/Mechanics/CompleteChecklistItem', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
            'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
        },
        body: `itemId=${itemId}&notes=${encodeURIComponent(notes || '')}&actualCost=${cost || ''}&actualDurationMinutes=${duration || ''}`
    })
    .then(response => response.json())
    .then(data => {
        if (data.success) {
            alert('Checklist item completed successfully!');
            location.reload();
        } else {
            alert('Error completing item: ' + data.message);
        }
    })
    .catch(error => {
        console.error('Error:', error);
        alert('Error completing item.');
    });
}
</script>

```

Rebuilding the application:


## Progress bar styling fixed

Updated the progress bar in the Service Checklist view. It now has:
- Height: 25px
- Rounded corners
- Visible background (#e9ecef)
- Striped animated style
- Percentage text inside the bar
- Smooth transitions
- Badge showing the percentage

Color coding:
- 100% Complete: green success
- In progress: blue primary
- Not started: gray secondary

The application is running at https://localhost:7213. Refresh the checklist page to see the updated progress bar.

**Cursor**

Checking for CSS overrides or Bootstrap conflicts that might prevent the updated progress bar styling from applying:


Styles look correct; the view was refreshed but the browser likely cached the old version. Adding a unique ID to bypass cache and ensure it re-renders.


```aspnetcorerazor
@model AutoEdge.Models.Entities.ServiceChecklist
@using AutoEdge.Models.Entities
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Service Checklist";
}

<div class="container mt-4">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h2><i class="fas fa-clipboard-list me-2"></i>Service Checklist</h2>
                <a href="/Mechanics/ServiceChecklists" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-2"></i>Back to Checklists
                </a>
            </div>

            <!-- Service Information -->
            <div class="card mb-4">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>Service Information</h5>
                    <div>
                        <span class="badge @(Model.IsCompleted ? "bg-success" : "bg-warning") fs-6">
                            @(Model.IsCompleted ? "Completed" : "In Progress")
                        </span>
                        <span class="badge bg-info ms-2">@Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")% Complete</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Vehicle & Customer</h6>
                            <p><strong>Vehicle:</strong> @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Make @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Model (@Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Year)</p>
                            <p><strong>Customer:</strong> @Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.CustomerName</p>
                            <p><strong>Reference:</strong> <code>@Model.ServiceJob.ServiceBooking.Reference</code></p>
                            <p><strong>Service Type:</strong> @Model.ServiceType</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Timing & Progress</h6>
                            <p><strong>Started:</strong> @Model.StartedAt.ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</p>
                            @if (Model.CompletedAt.HasValue)
                            {
                                <p><strong>Completed:</strong> @Model.CompletedAt.Value.ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy HH:mm")</p>
                                <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @((Model.CompletedAt.Value - Model.StartedAt).ToString(@"hh\:mm"))</p>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <p><strong>Duration:</strong> @((DateTime.UtcNow - Model.StartedAt).ToString(@"hh\:mm")) (ongoing)</p>
                            }
                            <p><strong>Progress:</strong> @Model.CompletedItemsCount of @Model.TotalItemsCount tasks completed</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Progress Bar -->
                    <div class="mt-3">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2">
                            <span><strong>Service Progress</strong></span>
                            <span class="badge @(Model.ProgressPercentage == 100 ? "bg-success" : Model.ProgressPercentage > 0 ? "bg-primary" : "bg-secondary")">@Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")%</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="progress" style="height: 30px !important; border-radius: 15px !important; overflow: hidden !important; background-color: #e9ecef !important; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) !important;">
                            <div class="progress-bar @(Model.ProgressPercentage == 100 ? "bg-success" : Model.ProgressPercentage > 0 ? "bg-primary" : "bg-secondary")" 
                                 role="progressbar" 
                                 style="width: @Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")% !important; 
                                        transition: width 0.6s ease !important;
                                        line-height: 30px !important;
                                        font-weight: bold !important;
                                        font-size: 14px !important;
                                        color: white !important;" 
                                 aria-valuenow="@Model.ProgressPercentage" 
                                 aria-valuemin="0" 
                                 aria-valuemax="100">
                                @Model.ProgressPercentage.ToString("F1")%
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Cost Summary -->
                    <div class="row mt-3">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Cost Summary</h6>
                            <p><strong>Estimated Total:</strong> R @Model.TotalEstimatedCost.ToString("F2")</p>
                            <p><strong>Actual Cost (so far):</strong> 
                                <span class="@(Model.TotalActualCost > Model.TotalEstimatedCost ? "text-danger" : "text-success")">
                                    R @Model.TotalActualCost.ToString("F2")
                                </span>
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <h6>Duration Summary</h6>
                            <p><strong>Estimated Duration:</strong> @Model.TotalEstimatedDurationMinutes minutes</p>
                            <p><strong>Actual Duration:</strong> @Model.TotalActualDurationMinutes minutes</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="row">
                <!-- Checklist Items -->
                <div class="col-md-8">
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-tasks me-2"></i>Checklist Items</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (Model.Items.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="list-group">
                                    @foreach (var item in Model.Items.OrderBy(i => i.Id))
                                    {
                                        <div class="list-group-item @(item.IsCompleted ? "list-group-item-success" : "")">
                                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
                                                <div class="flex-grow-1">
                                                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                                                        @if (item.IsCompleted)
                                                        {
                                                            <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-success me-3"></i>
                                                        }
                                                        else
                                                        {
                                                            <i class="fas fa-circle text-muted me-3"></i>
                                                        }
                                                        <div>
                                                            <h6 class="mb-1">@item.TaskName</h6>
                                                            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Description))
                                                            {
                                                                <p class="mb-1 text-muted">@item.Description</p>
                                                            }
                                                            @if (item.IsCompleted && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Notes))
                                                            {
                                                                <small class="text-success"><strong>Notes:</strong> @item.Notes</small>
                                                            }
                                                        </div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div class="text-end">
                                                    @if (item.IsCompleted)
                                                    {
                                                        <small class="text-success">Completed<br/>@item.CompletedAt?.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                                        @if (item.ActualCost.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            <br><strong class="@(item.ActualCost > item.EstimatedCost ? "text-danger" : "text-success")">
                                                                R @item.ActualCost.Value.ToString("F2")
                                                            </strong>
                                                        }
                                                    }
                                                    else
                                                    {
                                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success" onclick="completeItem(@item.Id)">
                                                            <i class="fas fa-check me-1"></i>Complete
                                                        </button>
                                                        @if (item.EstimatedCost.HasValue)
                                                        {
                                                            <br><small class="text-muted">Est: R @item.EstimatedCost.Value.ToString("F2")</small>
                                                        }
                                                    }
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-center py-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list fa-2x text-muted mb-2"></i>
                                    <p class="text-muted">No checklist items found.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Photos & Actions -->
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <!-- Photo Upload -->
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-camera me-2"></i>Before/After Photos</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                            {
                                <form id="photoUploadForm" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="checklistId" value="@Model.Id" />
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="photoType" class="form-label">Photo Type:</label>
                                        <select name="photoType" class="form-select" required>
                                            <option value="">Select photo type...</option>
                                            <option value="Before">Before Service</option>
                                            <option value="During">During Service</option>
                                            <option value="After">After Service</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="photo" class="form-label">Photo:</label>
                                        <input type="file" name="photo" class="form-control" accept="image/*" required />
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="description" class="form-label">Description (Optional):</label>
                                        <textarea name="description" class="form-control" rows="2" placeholder="Describe what's shown in the photo..."></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100">
                                        <i class="fas fa-upload me-2"></i>Upload Photo
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <p class="text-muted">Photo upload is disabled for completed checklists.</p>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Photos Gallery -->
                    <div class="card mb-4">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-images me-2"></i>Photos (@Model.Photos.Count)</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            @if (Model.Photos.Any())
                            {
                                <div class="row">
                                    @foreach (var photo in Model.Photos.OrderBy(p => p.TakenAt))
                                    {
                                        <div class="col-6 mb-3">
                                            <div class="position-relative">
                                                <img src="@photo.FilePath" class="img-thumbnail w-100" style="height: 100px; object-fit: cover;" 
                                                     data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#photoModal" 
                                                     data-photo-path="@photo.FilePath" data-photo-desc="@photo.Description" data-photo-type="@photo.PhotoType" />
                                                <span class="badge bg-primary position-absolute top-0 start-0 m-1">@photo.PhotoType</span>
                                            </div>
                                            <small class="text-muted d-block">@photo.TakenAt.ToString("HH:mm")</small>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <div class="text-center py-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-images fa-2x text-muted mb-2"></i>
                                    <p class="text-muted">No photos uploaded yet.</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Complete Checklist -->
                    @if (!Model.IsCompleted)
                    {
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="card-header">
                                <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-flag-checkered me-2"></i>Complete Service</h5>
                            </div>
                            <div class="card-body">
                                <form id="completeChecklistForm">
                                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                    <input type="hidden" name="checklistId" value="@Model.Id" />
                                    <div class="mb-3">
                                        <label for="completionNotes" class="form-label">Final Notes:</label>
                                        <textarea name="completionNotes" class="form-control" rows="3" placeholder="Any final notes about the service..."></textarea>
                                    </div>
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success w-100">
                                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2"></i>Complete Service
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Photo Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="photoModal" tabindex="-1">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h5 class="modal-title" id="photoModalTitle">Photo</h5>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body text-center">
                <img id="modalPhoto" class="img-fluid" style="max-height: 500px;" />
                <p id="modalPhotoDesc" class="mt-3 text-muted"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Photo upload form
    document.getElementById('photoUploadForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        
        fetch('/Mechanics/UploadPhoto', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
            },
            body: formData
        })
        .then(response => response.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) {
                alert('Photo uploaded successfully!');
                location.reload();
            } else {
                alert('Error uploading photo: ' + data.message);
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
            alert('Error uploading photo.');
        });
    });

    // Complete checklist form
    document.getElementById('completeChecklistForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to complete this service checklist? This action cannot be undone.')) {
            return;
        }
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const checklistId = formData.get('checklistId');
        const notes = formData.get('completionNotes');
        
        console.log('Completing checklist:', checklistId, 'with notes:', notes);
        
        fetch('/Mechanics/CompleteChecklist', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
                'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
            },
            body: `checklistId=${checklistId}&notes=${encodeURIComponent(notes || '')}`
        })
        .then(response => {
            console.log('Response status:', response.status);
            return response.json();
        })
        .then(data => {
            console.log('Response data:', data);
            if (data.success) {
                alert('Service checklist completed successfully!');
                location.reload();
            } else {
                alert('Error completing checklist: ' + data.message);
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
            alert('Error completing checklist: ' + error.message);
        });
    });

    // Photo modal
    document.getElementById('photoModal').addEventListener('show.bs.modal', function(event) {
        const button = event.relatedTarget;
        const photoPath = button.getAttribute('data-photo-path');
        const photoDesc = button.getAttribute('data-photo-desc');
        const photoType = button.getAttribute('data-photo-type');
        
        document.getElementById('modalPhoto').src = photoPath;
        document.getElementById('modalPhotoTitle').textContent = photoType + ' Photo';
        document.getElementById('modalPhotoDesc').textContent = photoDesc || 'No description provided.';
    });
});

function completeItem(itemId) {
    const notes = prompt('Add notes for this completed item (optional):');
    const actualCost = prompt('Enter actual cost (optional, press Cancel to use estimated cost):');
    const actualDuration = prompt('Enter actual duration in minutes (optional, press Cancel to use estimated duration):');
    
    const cost = actualCost && !isNaN(parseFloat(actualCost)) ? parseFloat(actualCost) : null;
    const duration = actualDuration && !isNaN(parseInt(actualDuration)) ? parseInt(actualDuration) : null;
    
    fetch('/Mechanics/CompleteChecklistItem', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
            'RequestVerificationToken': document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]')?.value || ''
        },
        body: `itemId=${itemId}&notes=${encodeURIComponent(notes || '')}&actualCost=${cost || ''}&actualDurationMinutes=${duration || ''}`
    })
    .then(response => response.json())
    .then(data => {
        if (data.success) {
            alert('Checklist item completed successfully!');
            location.reload();
        } else {
            alert('Error completing item: ' + data.message);
        }
    })
    .catch(error => {
        console.error('Error:', error);
        alert('Error completing item.');
    });
}
</script>

```

## Progress bar styling updated

Updated the progress bar with stronger overrides:

- 30px height
- Rounded corners (border-radius: 15px)
- Box shadow
- Percentage inside the bar
- Bold white text
- Smooth transition (0.6s)
- Color-coded: green when complete, blue in progress, gray not started

Added `!important` to ensure the styles override defaults.

### Important: clear your browser cache

Do a hard refresh (Ctrl+F5) so the updated view loads.
